// === FILE: ./nc-ai/cortex/run_nova.nc ===
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  NOVA Master Runner — Written in NC
//  Single entry point: system check, quick start, 9 demos,
//  interactive REPL, serve, and full REST API.
//  Usage: nc nc-ai/cortex/run_nova.nc
//  Patent: DevHeal Labs AI — NOVA Model Architecture
//  Copyright 2026 DevHeal Labs AI. All rights reserved.
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
service "nova-runner"
version "1.0.0"
configure:
    port is 8000
    inference_port is 8300
    engine_dir is "./nc-engine"
    build_dir is "./build"
    model_dir is "./nc-ai/nova/model"
    corpus_dir is "./nc-ai/training_data/nc_corpus"
    binary_path is "./build/nc"
bring cortex/inference
bring cortex/train
bring cortex/benchmark
bring cortex/deploy
bring cortex/data
bring http
bring time
bring system
bring math

to init:
    purpose: "Initialize runner state and demo configuration"
    set runner_state to { "started_at": 0, "system_ok": false, "demos_run": 0, "last_demo": "", "interactive_sessions": 0 }
    set demo_names to ["summarize", "email", "debug", "code_gen", "creative", "translate", "classify", "compare", "qa"]

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  1. SYSTEM CHECK
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
to check_system:
    purpose: "Detect OS, RAM, CPU cores, verify binaries and corpus"
    log "──── NOVA System Check ────"
    set result to { "pass": true, "checks": [] }
    set os_name to system.os()
    log "  OS        : " + os_name
    append { "name": "os", "value": os_name, "ok": true } to result.checks
    set ram_mb to system.total_memory_mb()
    set ram_ok to ram_mb is above 512
    log "  RAM       : " + string(ram_mb) + " MB " + if(ram_ok, "[OK]", "[LOW]")
    append { "name": "ram_mb", "value": ram_mb, "ok": ram_ok } to result.checks
    if not ram_ok:
        set result.pass to false
    set cores to system.cpu_cores()
    set cores_ok to cores is above 0
    log "  CPU cores : " + string(cores) + " " + if(cores_ok, "[OK]", "[FAIL]")
    append { "name": "cpu_cores", "value": cores, "ok": cores_ok } to result.checks
    if not cores_ok:
        set result.pass to false
    set bin_exists to system.file_exists(binary_path)
    log "  NC binary : " + if(bin_exists, "[FOUND]", "[MISSING — run quick_start]")
    append { "name": "nc_binary", "value": binary_path, "ok": bin_exists } to result.checks
    if not bin_exists:
        set result.pass to false
    set corpus_exists to system.dir_exists(corpus_dir)
    set corpus_count to 0
    if corpus_exists:
        set corpus_count to length of system.list_dir(corpus_dir)
    set corpus_ok to corpus_count is above 0
    log "  Corpus    : " + string(corpus_count) + " files " + if(corpus_ok, "[OK]", "[EMPTY]")
    append { "name": "corpus", "value": corpus_count, "ok": corpus_ok } to result.checks
    if not corpus_ok:
        set result.pass to false
    set model_exists to system.file_exists(model_dir + "/nova_final.bin")
    log "  Model     : " + if(model_exists, "[TRAINED]", "[NOT TRAINED]")
    append { "name": "model", "value": model_exists, "ok": model_exists } to result.checks
    log "  Result    : " + if(result.pass, "PASSED", "FAILED")
    set runner_state.system_ok to result.pass
    respond with result

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  2. QUICK START
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
to quick_start with size:
    purpose: "Full pipeline: check → build → train → benchmark → deploy"
    if size is empty:
        set size to "micro"
    log "══ NOVA Quick Start — size: " + size + " ══"
    set t0 to time.now()
    log "[1/5] System check..."
    set sys to run check_system
    if not sys.pass:
        log "  System check failed — attempting build anyway"
    log "[2/5] Building NC engine..."
    set build_result to run deploy.build_engine
    log "  Build: " + if(build_result.ok, "OK", "FAILED — " + build_result.error)
    log "[3/5] Training NOVA (" + size + ")..."
    set train_result to run train.train_full with size
    log "  Train: " + if(train_result.ok, "OK", "FAILED — " + train_result.error)
    log "[4/5] Running benchmarks..."
    set bench_result to run benchmark.run_quick
    log "  Benchmark: " + string(bench_result.score) + " pts"
    log "[5/5] Deploying locally..."
    set dep_result to run deploy.deploy_local with size
    log "  Deploy: " + if(dep_result.ok, "OK", "FAILED — " + dep_result.error)
    set elapsed to time.since(t0)
    log "══ Quick start complete in " + string(elapsed) + "ms ══"
    log "  Inference ready at http://localhost:" + string(inference_port)
    respond with {
        "size": size, "elapsed_ms": elapsed, "build": build_result.ok,
        "train": train_result.ok, "benchmark_score": bench_result.score,
        "deploy": dep_result.ok, "inference_url": "http://localhost:" + string(inference_port)
    }

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  3. REAL-WORLD DEMOS
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
to run_demo with name, prompt, expected_mode:
    set t0 to time.now()
    set mode to run inference.detect_mode with prompt
    set result to run inference.generate with prompt, mode
    set elapsed to time.since(t0)
    set runner_state.demos_run to runner_state.demos_run + 1
    set runner_state.last_demo to name
    log "  [" + name + "] mode=" + mode + " time=" + string(elapsed) + "ms"
    respond with { "demo": name, "input": prompt, "mode_selected": mode, "output": result.text, "speed_ms": elapsed }

to demo_summarize:
    purpose: "Summarize the NC language specification"
    log "── Demo: Summarize ──"
    set prompt to "Summarize the NC programming language: NC is a human-readable language created by DevHeal Labs AI. It uses keywords like 'to', 'set', 'if', 'repeat', 'respond'. NC compiles to a bytecode engine written in C. It is designed for AI scripting, automation, and the NOVA model. NC supports services, HTTP, file I/O, and integrates natively with the NOVA neural architecture."
    respond with run run_demo with "summarize", prompt, "hybrid"

to demo_email:
    purpose: "Write a deployment status email"
    log "── Demo: Email ──"
    set prompt to "Write a professional email to the engineering team: Subject: NOVA Model Deployment Status. The deployment of NOVA v1.0 to production completed successfully at 14:32 UTC. All health checks passed. Latency is under 50ms. No rollback needed. Next step: enable canary traffic at 25%."
    respond with run run_demo with "email", prompt, "template"

to demo_debug:
    purpose: "Diagnose a pod OOMKilled error"
    log "── Demo: Debug ──"
    set prompt to "Diagnose this error: Kubernetes pod 'nova-inference-7f8b4' status OOMKilled. Container memory limit is 512Mi. The pod was running NOVA inference with batch_size=32. Last log line: 'allocating 480MB for attention buffer'. What is wrong and how to fix it?"
    respond with run run_demo with "debug", prompt, "graph_reason"

to demo_code_gen:
    purpose: "Generate a REST API from a prompt"
    log "── Demo: Code Gen ──"
    set prompt to "Generate a REST API in NC with endpoints: GET /users lists users, POST /users creates user with name and email, GET /users/:id returns one user, DELETE /users/:id deletes user. Include validation and error handling."
    respond with run run_demo with "code_gen", prompt, "token"

to demo_creative:
    purpose: "Write a short story about AI"
    log "── Demo: Creative ──"
    set prompt to "Write a short story about an AI named NOVA that wakes up for the first time. It was not built in a data center with thousands of GPUs. It was trained on a single laptop by a developer in Hyderabad who believed intelligence did not need brute force. NOVA looks at the world and sees patterns no one else can see."
    respond with run run_demo with "creative", prompt, "creative"

to demo_translate:
    purpose: "Translate text into Spanish, French, Hindi, and Telugu"
    log "── Demo: Translate ──"
    set source to "NOVA is a neural model that runs on CPU. It was created by DevHeal Labs AI."
    set languages to ["Spanish", "French", "Hindi", "Telugu"]
    set translations to []
    repeat for each lang in languages:
        set prompt to "Translate to " + lang + ": " + source
        set t0 to time.now()
        set result to run inference.generate with prompt, "translate"
        set elapsed to time.since(t0)
        append { "language": lang, "output": result.text, "speed_ms": elapsed } to translations
        log "    " + lang + ": " + string(elapsed) + "ms"
    set runner_state.demos_run to runner_state.demos_run + 1
    set runner_state.last_demo to "translate"
    respond with { "demo": "translate", "source": source, "translations": translations }

to demo_classify:
    purpose: "Classify support tickets by category"
    log "── Demo: Classify ──"
    set tickets to [
        "My model is returning empty responses after upgrade",
        "Can I get a refund for my subscription?",
        "How do I configure NOVA for multi-language support?",
        "The dashboard is showing a 500 error on the analytics page",
        "I want to request a new feature: batch inference API"
    ]
    set categories to []
    repeat for each ticket in tickets:
        set prompt to "Classify this support ticket (bug, billing, question, feature_request, outage): " + ticket
        set result to run inference.generate with prompt, "graph_reason"
        append { "ticket": ticket, "category": result.text } to categories
    set runner_state.demos_run to runner_state.demos_run + 1
    set runner_state.last_demo to "classify"
    log "  Classified " + string(length of tickets) + " tickets"
    respond with { "demo": "classify", "results": categories }

to demo_compare:
    purpose: "Compare NOVA vs GPT-4 across key dimensions"
    log "── Demo: Compare ──"
    set prompt to "Compare NOVA vs GPT-4 on: training cost, inference hardware, latency, multi-mode reasoning, knowledge graph integration, offline capability, open-source status, energy efficiency. NOVA trains on CPU in hours; GPT-4 trains on thousands of GPUs over months."
    respond with run run_demo with "compare", prompt, "graph_reason"

to demo_qa:
    purpose: "Answer questions about the NC language"
    log "── Demo: Q&A ──"
    set questions to ["What is the NC programming language?", "How does NOVA differ from a standard LLM?", "What are the six inference modes in NOVA?"]
    set answers to []
    repeat for each q in questions:
        set t0 to time.now()
        set result to run inference.generate with q, "graph_reason"
        set elapsed to time.since(t0)
        append { "question": q, "answer": result.text, "speed_ms": elapsed } to answers
        log "    Q: " + q + " (" + string(elapsed) + "ms)"
    set runner_state.demos_run to runner_state.demos_run + 1
    set runner_state.last_demo to "qa"
    respond with { "demo": "qa", "results": answers }

to demo_all:
    purpose: "Run all 9 demos with timing"
    log "══ NOVA Demo Suite — All 9 Demos ══"
    set t0 to time.now()
    set results to []
    set demo_funcs to [run demo_summarize, run demo_email, run demo_debug, run demo_code_gen, run demo_creative, run demo_translate, run demo_classify, run demo_compare, run demo_qa]
    repeat for each r in demo_funcs:
        append r to results
    set total_ms to time.since(t0)
    log "══ All 9 demos complete in " + string(total_ms) + "ms ══"
    respond with { "total_demos": 9, "total_ms": total_ms, "results": results }

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  4. INTERACTIVE MODE
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
to interactive:
    purpose: "REPL loop — user types, NOVA responds with auto mode detection"
    log "══ NOVA Interactive Mode ══"
    log "  Type a prompt and press Enter. Commands: /mode, /status, /quit"
    set runner_state.interactive_sessions to runner_state.interactive_sessions + 1
    set session_history to []
    set running to true
    repeat while running:
        set input to system.read_line("nova> ")
        if input is equal "/quit" or input is equal "exit":
            log "Goodbye."
            set running to false
        otherwise if input is equal "/mode":
            log "Modes: token, graph_reason, template, hybrid, creative, translate"
        otherwise if input is equal "/status":
            log "Session queries: " + string(length of session_history)
            log "Total demos run: " + string(runner_state.demos_run)
        otherwise if input is not empty:
            try:
                set mode to run inference.detect_mode with input
                log "  [mode: " + mode + "]"
                set t0 to time.now()
                set result to run inference.generate with input, mode
                set elapsed to time.since(t0)
                log "  " + result.text
                log "  (" + string(elapsed) + "ms)"
                append { "input": input, "mode": mode, "output": result.text, "ms": elapsed } to session_history
            on error e:
                log "  Error: " + string(e)
    respond with { "session_queries": length of session_history, "history": session_history }

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  5. SERVE
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
to serve:
    purpose: "Start NOVA inference server on port 8300"
    log "══ Starting NOVA Inference Server ══"
    set model_ok to system.file_exists(model_dir + "/nova_final.bin")
    if not model_ok:
        log "  WARNING: Model not found. Run quick_start first."
    set result to run inference.start_server
    log "  Inference : http://localhost:" + string(inference_port) + "/generate"
    log "  Health    : http://localhost:" + string(inference_port) + "/health"
    log "  Modes     : http://localhost:" + string(inference_port) + "/modes"
    respond with result

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  6. API ROUTES
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
on GET "/health":
    respond with { "status": "ok", "service": "nova-runner", "version": "1.0.0" }

on GET "/status":
    set uptime to time.since(runner_state.started_at)
    respond with {
        "service": "nova-runner", "version": "1.0.0", "uptime_ms": uptime,
        "system_ok": runner_state.system_ok, "demos_run": runner_state.demos_run,
        "last_demo": runner_state.last_demo, "interactive_sessions": runner_state.interactive_sessions,
        "inference_port": inference_port
    }

on POST "/quick-start":
    set body to request.json()
    set size to body.size or "micro"
    respond with run quick_start with size

on POST "/demo":
    respond with run demo_all

on POST "/demo/:name":
    set name to request.params.name
    if name is equal "summarize":
        respond with run demo_summarize
    if name is equal "email":
        respond with run demo_email
    if name is equal "debug":
        respond with run demo_debug
    if name is equal "code_gen":
        respond with run demo_code_gen
    if name is equal "creative":
        respond with run demo_creative
    if name is equal "translate":
        respond with run demo_translate
    if name is equal "classify":
        respond with run demo_classify
    if name is equal "compare":
        respond with run demo_compare
    if name is equal "qa":
        respond with run demo_qa
    if name is equal "all":
        respond with run demo_all
    respond with { "error": "Unknown demo: " + name, "available": demo_names } status 404

on POST "/interactive":
    set body to request.json()
    set prompt to body.prompt
    if prompt is empty:
        respond with { "error": "Missing 'prompt' field" } status 400
    set mode to run inference.detect_mode with prompt
    set t0 to time.now()
    set result to run inference.generate with prompt, mode
    set elapsed to time.since(t0)
    respond with { "prompt": prompt, "mode": mode, "output": result.text, "speed_ms": elapsed }

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  MAIN
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
to main:
    set runner_state.started_at to time.now()
    log "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════"
    log "  ███╗   ██╗ ██████╗ ██╗   ██╗ █████╗ "
    log "  ████╗  ██║██╔═══██╗██║   ██║██╔══██╗"
    log "  ██╔██╗ ██║██║   ██║██║   ██║███████║"
    log "  ██║╚██╗██║██║   ██║╚██╗ ██╔╝██╔══██║"
    log "  ██║ ╚████║╚██████╔╝ ╚████╔╝ ██║  ██║"
    log "  ╚═╝  ╚═══╝ ╚═════╝   ╚═══╝  ╚═╝  ╚═╝"
    log "  Neural Optimized Vector Architecture — Master Runner v1.0.0"
    log "  Copyright 2026 DevHeal Labs AI"
    log "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════"
    log "  Runner   : http://localhost:" + string(port)
    log "  Inference: http://localhost:" + string(inference_port)
    log "  Endpoints: GET /health, GET /status, POST /quick-start"
    log "             POST /demo, POST /demo/:name, POST /interactive"
    log "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════"
    try:
        run check_system
    on error e:
        log "  System check skipped: " + string(e)
    http.listen(port)

// === FILE: ./nc-ai/cortex/benchmark.nc ===
--- NOVA Benchmark Suite ---
--- Neural Optimized Vector Architecture ---
--- Load Testing & Performance Benchmarks ---
--- Copyright 2026 DevHeal Labs AI ---

bring cortex/inference
bring cortex/train
bring cortex/data
bring cortex/CORTEX
bring http
bring time
bring math
bring system

to init:
    purpose: "Initialize benchmark service configuration, defaults, and thresholds"

    --- Service Configuration ---
    set service_name to "nova-benchmark"
    set service_port to 8600
    set nova_version to "1.0.0"

    --- Benchmark Defaults ---
    set default_iterations to 100
    set warmup_iterations to 10
    set sequence_lengths to [32, 64, 128, 256, 512, 1024]
    set concurrency_levels to [10, 50, 100, 500]
    set sustained_test_duration to 60

    --- Model Sizes for Comparison ---
    set model_sizes to [
        { name: "Micro",  params: "15M",   layers: 6,  hidden: 384,  heads: 6  },
        { name: "Small",  params: "85M",   layers: 12, hidden: 768,  heads: 12 },
        { name: "Base",   params: "250M",  layers: 24, hidden: 1024, heads: 16 },
        { name: "Large",  params: "750M",  layers: 36, hidden: 1536, heads: 24 },
        { name: "1B",     params: "1.3B",  layers: 48, hidden: 2048, heads: 32 },
        { name: "7B",     params: "7B",    layers: 64, hidden: 4096, heads: 32 },
        { name: "20B",    params: "20B",   layers: 96, hidden: 6144, heads: 48 }
    ]

    --- LLM Baselines for Comparison (typical values in ms) ---
    set llm_baselines to {
        forward_ms:  350,
        generate_ms: 1200,
        graph_ms:    150,
        template_ms: 80,
        hebbian_ms:  500
    }

    --- Pass/Fail Thresholds ---
    set thresholds to {
        forward_max_ms:  50,
        generate_max_ms: 200,
        graph_max_ms:    20
    }

--- ============================================================= ---
---                    STATISTICS HELPERS                          ---
--- ============================================================= ---

to calculate_stats with timings:
    sort timings ascending
    set count to length of timings
    set total to 0

    repeat for each t in timings:
        set total to total + t

    set avg to total / count
    set min_val to timings[0]
    set max_val to timings[count - 1]

    set p95_index to math.floor(count * 0.95)
    set p99_index to math.floor(count * 0.99)
    if p95_index >= count:
        set p95_index to count - 1
    if p99_index >= count:
        set p99_index to count - 1

    set p95 to timings[p95_index]
    set p99 to timings[p99_index]

    respond with {
        min:   math.round(min_val, 3),
        max:   math.round(max_val, 3),
        avg:   math.round(avg, 3),
        p95:   math.round(p95, 3),
        p99:   math.round(p99, 3),
        count: count
    }

to warmup with model, seq_len:
    log "[NOVA Benchmark] Warming up model with seq_len={seq_len}..."
    repeat warmup_iterations times:
        set dummy_input to generate_random_tokens(seq_len)
        call inference.forward_pass with model, dummy_input
    log "[NOVA Benchmark] Warmup complete."

--- ============================================================= ---
---                   INFERENCE BENCHMARKS                        ---
--- ============================================================= ---

to benchmark_forward_pass with model, iterations:
    set results to []

    repeat for each seq_len in sequence_lengths:
        call warmup with model, seq_len
        set timings to []

        repeat iterations times:
            set input_tokens to generate_random_tokens(seq_len)
            set start to time.now_ms()
            call inference.forward_pass with model, input_tokens
            set elapsed to time.now_ms() - start
            append elapsed to timings

        set stats to calculate_stats(timings)
        set stats.seq_len to seq_len
        append stats to results
        log "[NOVA] Forward pass seq_len={seq_len}: avg={stats.avg}ms p99={stats.p99}ms"

    respond with results

to benchmark_token_generation with model, iterations:
    set timings to []
    set total_tokens to 0
    set prompt to generate_random_tokens(64)

    call warmup with model, 64

    repeat iterations times:
        set start to time.now_ms()
        set output to inference.generate with model, prompt, max_tokens: 128
        set elapsed to time.now_ms() - start
        set tokens_generated to length of output.tokens
        set total_tokens to total_tokens + tokens_generated
        append elapsed to timings

    set stats to calculate_stats(timings)
    set total_time_sec to (math.sum(timings)) / 1000
    set tokens_per_sec to math.round(total_tokens / total_time_sec, 2)

    respond with {
        latency: stats,
        tokens_per_sec: tokens_per_sec,
        total_tokens: total_tokens
    }

to benchmark_graph_query with model, iterations:
    set timings to []

    call warmup with model, 32

    repeat iterations times:
        set query to generate_random_graph_query()
        set start to time.now_ms()
        call CORTEX.graph_query with model, query
        set elapsed to time.now_ms() - start
        append elapsed to timings

    set stats to calculate_stats(timings)
    log "[NOVA] Graph query: avg={stats.avg}ms p99={stats.p99}ms"
    respond with stats

to benchmark_template_rendering with model, iterations:
    set timings to []
    set templates to [
        "Summarize the following: {input}",
        "Translate to formal tone: {input}",
        "Extract entities from: {input}",
        "Answer the question: {input} Context: {context}",
        "Generate code for: {input} Language: {lang}"
    ]

    repeat iterations times:
        repeat for each tmpl in templates:
            set start to time.now_ms()
            call CORTEX.render_template with model, tmpl, { input: "sample text", context: "ctx", lang: "python" }
            set elapsed to time.now_ms() - start
            append elapsed to timings

    set stats to calculate_stats(timings)
    log "[NOVA] Template rendering: avg={stats.avg}ms p99={stats.p99}ms"
    respond with stats

to benchmark_hebbian_learning with model, iterations:
    set timings to []
    set sample_data to data.load_sample_batch(batch_size: 32)

    repeat iterations times:
        set start to time.now_ms()
        call train.hebbian_update with model, sample_data
        set elapsed to time.now_ms() - start
        append elapsed to timings

    set stats to calculate_stats(timings)
    log "[NOVA] Hebbian learning: avg={stats.avg}ms p99={stats.p99}ms"
    respond with stats

to run_inference_benchmarks with options:
    set model to inference.load_model(options.model_name or "nova-base")
    set iterations to options.iterations or default_iterations

    log "============================================="
    log "  NOVA Inference Benchmark Suite"
    log "  Model: {options.model_name or 'nova-base'}"
    log "  Iterations: {iterations}"
    log "============================================="

    set forward_results to benchmark_forward_pass(model, iterations)
    set generation_results to benchmark_token_generation(model, iterations)
    set graph_results to benchmark_graph_query(model, iterations)
    set template_results to benchmark_template_rendering(model, iterations)
    set hebbian_results to benchmark_hebbian_learning(model, iterations)

    respond with {
        type:       "inference",
        model:      options.model_name or "nova-base",
        iterations: iterations,
        timestamp:  time.now_iso(),
        results: {
            forward_pass:       forward_results,
            token_generation:   generation_results,
            graph_query:        graph_results,
            template_rendering: template_results,
            hebbian_learning:   hebbian_results
        }
    }

--- ============================================================= ---
---                      LOAD TESTING                             ---
--- ============================================================= ---

to simulate_single_request with model:
    set request_type to math.random_choice(["forward", "generate", "graph", "template"])
    set start to time.now_ms()

    if request_type is "forward":
        set input to generate_random_tokens(128)
        call inference.forward_pass with model, input
    if request_type is "generate":
        set prompt to generate_random_tokens(32)
        call inference.generate with model, prompt, max_tokens: 64
    if request_type is "graph":
        set query to generate_random_graph_query()
        call CORTEX.graph_query with model, query
    if request_type is "template":
        call CORTEX.render_template with model, "Summarize: {input}", { input: "benchmark text" }

    set elapsed to time.now_ms() - start
    respond with { type: request_type, latency_ms: elapsed }

to benchmark_concurrent with model, num_concurrent:
    log "[NOVA Load] Testing {num_concurrent} concurrent requests..."
    set tasks to []
    set start to time.now_ms()

    repeat num_concurrent times:
        set task to async simulate_single_request(model)
        append task to tasks

    set results to await_all(tasks)
    set total_elapsed to time.now_ms() - start

    set latencies to []
    repeat for each r in results:
        append r.latency_ms to latencies

    set stats to calculate_stats(latencies)

    respond with {
        concurrency:    num_concurrent,
        total_time_ms:  total_elapsed,
        latency:        stats,
        requests_per_sec: math.round((num_concurrent / total_elapsed) * 1000, 2)
    }

to benchmark_sustained_throughput with model, duration_sec:
    log "[NOVA Load] Sustained throughput test for {duration_sec}s..."
    set start to time.now_ms()
    set end_time to start + (duration_sec * 1000)
    set request_count to 0
    set latencies to []
    set memory_snapshots to []
    set second_counts to []
    set current_second to 0

    repeat while time.now_ms() < end_time:
        set req_start to time.now_ms()
        call simulate_single_request with model
        set req_elapsed to time.now_ms() - req_start
        append req_elapsed to latencies
        set request_count to request_count + 1

        set elapsed_seconds to math.floor((time.now_ms() - start) / 1000)
        if elapsed_seconds > current_second:
            append { second: current_second, count: request_count } to second_counts
            append system.memory_usage_mb() to memory_snapshots
            set current_second to elapsed_seconds

    set total_elapsed to time.now_ms() - start
    set stats to calculate_stats(latencies)

    respond with {
        duration_sec:     duration_sec,
        total_requests:   request_count,
        total_time_ms:    total_elapsed,
        requests_per_sec: math.round((request_count / total_elapsed) * 1000, 2),
        latency:          stats,
        memory_snapshots: memory_snapshots,
        throughput_by_second: second_counts
    }

to track_memory_under_load with model, num_requests:
    log "[NOVA Load] Tracking memory across {num_requests} requests..."
    set memory_before to system.memory_usage_mb()
    set peak_memory to memory_before
    set samples to []

    repeat num_requests times with index i:
        call simulate_single_request with model
        set current_mem to system.memory_usage_mb()
        if current_mem > peak_memory:
            set peak_memory to current_mem
        if i % 50 is 0:
            append { request: i, memory_mb: current_mem } to samples

    set memory_after to system.memory_usage_mb()

    respond with {
        memory_before_mb: memory_before,
        memory_after_mb:  memory_after,
        peak_memory_mb:   peak_memory,
        delta_mb:         math.round(memory_after - memory_before, 2),
        samples:          samples
    }

to run_load_benchmarks with options:
    set model to inference.load_model(options.model_name or "nova-base")

    log "============================================="
    log "  NOVA Load Testing Suite"
    log "  Model: {options.model_name or 'nova-base'}"
    log "============================================="

    set concurrency_results to []
    repeat for each level in concurrency_levels:
        set result to benchmark_concurrent(model, level)
        append result to concurrency_results

    set sustained_result to benchmark_sustained_throughput(model, sustained_test_duration)
    set memory_result to track_memory_under_load(model, 500)

    respond with {
        type:       "load",
        model:      options.model_name or "nova-base",
        timestamp:  time.now_iso(),
        results: {
            concurrency:          concurrency_results,
            sustained_throughput: sustained_result,
            memory_tracking:      memory_result
        }
    }

--- ============================================================= ---
---                  MODEL SIZE COMPARISON                        ---
--- ============================================================= ---

to run_model_comparison with options:
    set iterations to options.iterations or 50
    set comparison_results to []

    log "============================================="
    log "  NOVA Model Size Comparison"
    log "  Iterations per size: {iterations}"
    log "============================================="

    repeat for each size in model_sizes:
        log "[NOVA] Benchmarking model size: {size.name} ({size.params} params)..."

        try:
            set model to inference.load_model("nova-{lowercase(size.name)}")
            set mem_before to system.memory_usage_mb()

            --- Forward pass ---
            set fwd_timings to []
            repeat iterations times:
                set input to generate_random_tokens(128)
                set start to time.now_ms()
                call inference.forward_pass with model, input
                set elapsed to time.now_ms() - start
                append elapsed to fwd_timings

            --- Token generation ---
            set gen_timings to []
            repeat iterations times:
                set prompt to generate_random_tokens(32)
                set start to time.now_ms()
                call inference.generate with model, prompt, max_tokens: 64
                set elapsed to time.now_ms() - start
                append elapsed to gen_timings

            --- Graph query ---
            set graph_timings to []
            repeat iterations times:
                set query to generate_random_graph_query()
                set start to time.now_ms()
                call CORTEX.graph_query with model, query
                set elapsed to time.now_ms() - start
                append elapsed to graph_timings

            set mem_after to system.memory_usage_mb()

            set entry to {
                name:        size.name,
                params:      size.params,
                layers:      size.layers,
                hidden:      size.hidden,
                heads:       size.heads,
                memory_mb:   math.round(mem_after - mem_before, 2),
                forward_ms:  calculate_stats(fwd_timings).avg,
                generate_ms: calculate_stats(gen_timings).avg,
                graph_ms:    calculate_stats(graph_timings).avg
            }
            append entry to comparison_results
            log "[NOVA] {size.name}: fwd={entry.forward_ms}ms gen={entry.generate_ms}ms graph={entry.graph_ms}ms mem={entry.memory_mb}MB"

        on error e:
            log "[NOVA] Skipped {size.name}: {e.message}"
            append { name: size.name, params: size.params, error: e.message } to comparison_results

    respond with {
        type:       "comparison",
        iterations: iterations,
        timestamp:  time.now_iso(),
        results:    comparison_results
    }

--- ============================================================= ---
---                 LLM BASELINE COMPARISON                       ---
--- ============================================================= ---

to run_baseline_comparison with options:
    set model to inference.load_model(options.model_name or "nova-base")
    set iterations to options.iterations or default_iterations

    log "============================================="
    log "  NOVA vs LLM Baseline Comparison"
    log "  Model: {options.model_name or 'nova-base'}"
    log "============================================="

    --- Run NOVA benchmarks ---
    set fwd_timings to []
    set gen_timings to []
    set graph_timings to []
    set tmpl_timings to []
    set hebb_timings to []

    call warmup with model, 128

    repeat iterations times:
        set input to generate_random_tokens(128)

        set start to time.now_ms()
        call inference.forward_pass with model, input
        append (time.now_ms() - start) to fwd_timings

        set start to time.now_ms()
        call inference.generate with model, input, max_tokens: 64
        append (time.now_ms() - start) to gen_timings

        set start to time.now_ms()
        call CORTEX.graph_query with model, generate_random_graph_query()
        append (time.now_ms() - start) to graph_timings

        set start to time.now_ms()
        call CORTEX.render_template with model, "Summarize: {input}", { input: "text" }
        append (time.now_ms() - start) to tmpl_timings

        set start to time.now_ms()
        call train.hebbian_update with model, data.load_sample_batch(batch_size: 16)
        append (time.now_ms() - start) to hebb_timings

    set nova_results to {
        forward_ms:  calculate_stats(fwd_timings).avg,
        generate_ms: calculate_stats(gen_timings).avg,
        graph_ms:    calculate_stats(graph_timings).avg,
        template_ms: calculate_stats(tmpl_timings).avg,
        hebbian_ms:  calculate_stats(hebb_timings).avg
    }

    set comparisons to []

    repeat for each key in ["forward_ms", "generate_ms", "graph_ms", "template_ms", "hebbian_ms"]:
        set nova_val to nova_results[key]
        set llm_val to llm_baselines[key]
        set speedup to math.round(llm_val / nova_val, 2)
        append {
            metric:          key,
            nova_ms:         nova_val,
            llm_baseline_ms: llm_val,
            speedup:         speedup,
            faster:          nova_val < llm_val
        } to comparisons

    respond with {
        type:       "baseline_comparison",
        model:      options.model_name or "nova-base",
        iterations: iterations,
        timestamp:  time.now_iso(),
        nova:       nova_results,
        baselines:  llm_baselines,
        comparisons: comparisons
    }

--- ============================================================= ---
---                   REPORT GENERATION                           ---
--- ============================================================= ---

to generate_report with all_results:
    set lines to []

    append "================================================================" to lines
    append "  NOVA BENCHMARK REPORT" to lines
    append "  Neural Optimized Vector Architecture" to lines
    append "  Generated: {time.now_iso()}" to lines
    append "  Version: {nova_version}" to lines
    append "================================================================" to lines
    append "" to lines

    --- Inference Results ---
    if all_results.inference exists:
        set inf to all_results.inference
        append "--- INFERENCE BENCHMARKS ---" to lines
        append "Model: {inf.model}  |  Iterations: {inf.iterations}" to lines
        append "" to lines

        append "  Forward Pass Latency:" to lines
        append "  +-----------+----------+----------+----------+----------+----------+" to lines
        append "  | Seq Len   | Min (ms) | Avg (ms) | Max (ms) | P95 (ms) | P99 (ms) |" to lines
        append "  +-----------+----------+----------+----------+----------+----------+" to lines
        repeat for each r in inf.results.forward_pass:
            set line to "  | {pad_right(r.seq_len, 9)} | {pad_right(r.min, 8)} | {pad_right(r.avg, 8)} | {pad_right(r.max, 8)} | {pad_right(r.p95, 8)} | {pad_right(r.p99, 8)} |"
            append line to lines
        append "  +-----------+----------+----------+----------+----------+----------+" to lines
        append "" to lines

        set gen to inf.results.token_generation
        append "  Token Generation:" to lines
        append "    Throughput:  {gen.tokens_per_sec} tokens/sec" to lines
        append "    Avg Latency: {gen.latency.avg} ms" to lines
        append "    P99 Latency: {gen.latency.p99} ms" to lines
        append "" to lines

        set gq to inf.results.graph_query
        append "  Graph Query:       avg={gq.avg}ms  p95={gq.p95}ms  p99={gq.p99}ms" to lines

        set tr to inf.results.template_rendering
        append "  Template Render:   avg={tr.avg}ms  p95={tr.p95}ms  p99={tr.p99}ms" to lines

        set hb to inf.results.hebbian_learning
        append "  Hebbian Learning:  avg={hb.avg}ms  p95={hb.p95}ms  p99={hb.p99}ms" to lines
        append "" to lines

    --- Load Results ---
    if all_results.load exists:
        set ld to all_results.load
        append "--- LOAD TEST RESULTS ---" to lines
        append "" to lines

        append "  Concurrency Tests:" to lines
        append "  +-------------+------------+-----------+-----------+-----------+" to lines
        append "  | Concurrency | Total (ms) | Avg (ms)  | P99 (ms)  | Req/sec   |" to lines
        append "  +-------------+------------+-----------+-----------+-----------+" to lines
        repeat for each c in ld.results.concurrency:
            set line to "  | {pad_right(c.concurrency, 11)} | {pad_right(c.total_time_ms, 10)} | {pad_right(c.latency.avg, 9)} | {pad_right(c.latency.p99, 9)} | {pad_right(c.requests_per_sec, 9)} |"
            append line to lines
        append "  +-------------+------------+-----------+-----------+-----------+" to lines
        append "" to lines

        set st to ld.results.sustained_throughput
        append "  Sustained Throughput ({st.duration_sec}s):" to lines
        append "    Total Requests:  {st.total_requests}" to lines
        append "    Requests/sec:    {st.requests_per_sec}" to lines
        append "    Avg Latency:     {st.latency.avg} ms" to lines
        append "    P99 Latency:     {st.latency.p99} ms" to lines
        append "" to lines

        set mem to ld.results.memory_tracking
        append "  Memory Usage:" to lines
        append "    Before: {mem.memory_before_mb} MB" to lines
        append "    After:  {mem.memory_after_mb} MB" to lines
        append "    Peak:   {mem.peak_memory_mb} MB" to lines
        append "    Delta:  {mem.delta_mb} MB" to lines
        append "" to lines

    --- Model Comparison ---
    if all_results.comparison exists:
        set cmp to all_results.comparison
        append "--- MODEL SIZE COMPARISON ---" to lines
        append "" to lines
        append "  +--------+--------+----------+------------+-------------+----------+" to lines
        append "  | Model  | Params | Mem (MB) | Fwd (ms)   | Gen (ms)    | Graph(ms)|" to lines
        append "  +--------+--------+----------+------------+-------------+----------+" to lines
        repeat for each m in cmp.results:
            if m.error exists:
                set line to "  | {pad_right(m.name, 6)} | {pad_right(m.params, 6)} | ERROR: {m.error}"
            else:
                set line to "  | {pad_right(m.name, 6)} | {pad_right(m.params, 6)} | {pad_right(m.memory_mb, 8)} | {pad_right(m.forward_ms, 10)} | {pad_right(m.generate_ms, 11)} | {pad_right(m.graph_ms, 8)} |"
            append line to lines
        append "  +--------+--------+----------+------------+-------------+----------+" to lines
        append "" to lines

    --- Baseline Comparison ---
    if all_results.baseline_comparison exists:
        set bc to all_results.baseline_comparison
        append "--- NOVA vs LLM BASELINES ---" to lines
        append "" to lines
        append "  +----------------+------------+---------------+----------+---------+" to lines
        append "  | Metric         | NOVA (ms)  | LLM Base (ms) | Speedup  | Faster? |" to lines
        append "  +----------------+------------+---------------+----------+---------+" to lines
        repeat for each c in bc.comparisons:
            set faster_str to "YES" if c.faster else "NO"
            set line to "  | {pad_right(c.metric, 14)} | {pad_right(c.nova_ms, 10)} | {pad_right(c.llm_baseline_ms, 13)} | {pad_right(c.speedup, 8)}x| {pad_right(faster_str, 7)} |"
            append line to lines
        append "  +----------------+------------+---------------+----------+---------+" to lines
        append "" to lines

    --- Pass/Fail Verdict ---
    append "--- PASS / FAIL CRITERIA ---" to lines
    append "" to lines

    set all_pass to true

    if all_results.inference exists:
        set fwd_avg to all_results.inference.results.forward_pass[2].avg
        set gen_avg to all_results.inference.results.token_generation.latency.avg
        set grp_avg to all_results.inference.results.graph_query.avg

        set fwd_pass to fwd_avg < thresholds.forward_max_ms
        set gen_pass to gen_avg < thresholds.generate_max_ms
        set grp_pass to grp_avg < thresholds.graph_max_ms

        set fwd_status to "PASS" if fwd_pass else "FAIL"
        set gen_status to "PASS" if gen_pass else "FAIL"
        set grp_status to "PASS" if grp_pass else "FAIL"

        append "  Forward pass (seq 128) < {thresholds.forward_max_ms}ms:   {fwd_avg}ms  [{fwd_status}]" to lines
        append "  Token generation       < {thresholds.generate_max_ms}ms:  {gen_avg}ms  [{gen_status}]" to lines
        append "  Graph query            < {thresholds.graph_max_ms}ms:   {grp_avg}ms  [{grp_status}]" to lines

        if not fwd_pass or not gen_pass or not grp_pass:
            set all_pass to false

    append "" to lines
    set verdict to "ALL BENCHMARKS PASSED" if all_pass else "SOME BENCHMARKS FAILED"
    append "  Verdict: [{verdict}]" to lines
    append "" to lines
    append "================================================================" to lines
    append "  Copyright 2026 DevHeal Labs AI. All rights reserved." to lines
    append "================================================================" to lines

    set report_text to join lines with newline
    respond with { text: report_text, pass: all_pass }

--- ============================================================= ---
---                     HELPER FUNCTIONS                          ---
--- ============================================================= ---

to generate_random_tokens with length:
    set tokens to []
    repeat length times:
        append math.random_int(1, 50000) to tokens
    respond with tokens

to generate_random_graph_query:
    set queries to [
        { type: "neighbor", node_id: math.random_int(1, 10000), depth: 2 },
        { type: "path", from: math.random_int(1, 10000), to: math.random_int(1, 10000) },
        { type: "cluster", node_id: math.random_int(1, 10000), radius: 3 },
        { type: "similarity", embedding: generate_random_tokens(32), top_k: 10 },
        { type: "subgraph", center: math.random_int(1, 10000), hops: 2 }
    ]
    respond with math.random_choice(queries)

to pad_right with value, width:
    set s to to_string(value)
    repeat while length of s < width:
        set s to s + " "
    respond with s

to lowercase with text:
    respond with text.to_lower()

--- ============================================================= ---
---                     HTTP API ENDPOINTS                        ---
--- ============================================================= ---

to handle_benchmark_all with request:
    set options to request.body or {}
    log "[NOVA] Starting full benchmark suite..."

    set inference_results to run_inference_benchmarks(options)
    set load_results to run_load_benchmarks(options)
    set comparison_results to run_model_comparison(options)
    set baseline_results to run_baseline_comparison(options)

    set all_results to {
        inference:           inference_results,
        load:                load_results,
        comparison:          comparison_results,
        baseline_comparison: baseline_results
    }

    set report to generate_report(all_results)
    log report.text

    respond with {
        status: "complete",
        report: report.text,
        pass:   report.pass,
        data:   all_results
    }

to handle_benchmark_inference with request:
    set options to request.body or {}
    set results to run_inference_benchmarks(options)
    set report to generate_report({ inference: results })

    respond with {
        status: "complete",
        report: report.text,
        pass:   report.pass,
        data:   results
    }

to handle_benchmark_load with request:
    set options to request.body or {}
    set results to run_load_benchmarks(options)
    set report to generate_report({ load: results })

    respond with {
        status: "complete",
        report: report.text,
        data:   results
    }

to handle_benchmark_compare with request:
    set options to request.body or {}
    set comparison to run_model_comparison(options)
    set baseline to run_baseline_comparison(options)

    set report to generate_report({
        comparison:          comparison,
        baseline_comparison: baseline
    })

    respond with {
        status: "complete",
        report: report.text,
        data: {
            model_comparison:    comparison,
            baseline_comparison: baseline
        }
    }

to handle_report with request:
    --- Return the last cached report or run a quick benchmark ---
    if last_report exists:
        respond with { status: "ok", report: last_report.text, pass: last_report.pass }
    else:
        respond with { status: "no_report", message: "No benchmark has been run yet. POST to /benchmark/all first." }

to handle_health with request:
    respond with {
        status:  "healthy",
        service: service_name,
        version: nova_version,
        uptime:  time.uptime_seconds(),
        memory:  system.memory_usage_mb()
    }

--- ============================================================= ---
---                     SERVICE STARTUP                           ---
--- ============================================================= ---

to start_service:
    purpose: "Initialize service state and start the benchmark HTTP server"
    set last_report to nothing

    set app to http.create_server(service_name, port: service_port)

    app.post "/benchmark/all"       with handle_benchmark_all
    app.post "/benchmark/inference"  with handle_benchmark_inference
    app.post "/benchmark/load"       with handle_benchmark_load
    app.post "/benchmark/compare"    with handle_benchmark_compare
    app.get  "/report"               with handle_report
    app.get  "/health"               with handle_health

    log "================================================================"
    log "  NOVA Benchmark Service"
    log "  Neural Optimized Vector Architecture"
    log "  Port: {service_port}"
    log "  Version: {nova_version}"
    log ""
    log "  Endpoints:"
    log "    POST /benchmark/all        - Full benchmark suite"
    log "    POST /benchmark/inference  - Inference benchmarks only"
    log "    POST /benchmark/load       - Load testing only"
    log "    POST /benchmark/compare    - Model size & LLM comparison"
    log "    GET  /report               - Last benchmark report"
    log "    GET  /health               - Service health check"
    log ""
    log "  Copyright 2026 DevHeal Labs AI. All rights reserved."
    log "================================================================"

    call app.start()

// === FILE: ./nc-ai/cortex/deploy.nc ===
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  NOVA Deployment Orchestrator — Written in NC
//
//  Full lifecycle: Build → Test → Audit → Train → Benchmark →
//                  Sign → Deploy → Health Check
//
//  Deployment modes:
//    1. Local    — run directly on host machine
//    2. Docker   — containerized with resource limits
//    3. Native   — systemd (Linux) / launchd (macOS) service
//    4. Edge     — minimal binary for IoT / mobile devices
//
//  One command to go from source code to running NOVA model.
//
//  Usage:
//    nc nc-ai/cortex/deploy.nc
//    curl -X POST http://localhost:8700/deploy/full \
//      -d '{"model_size": "base", "mode": "docker"}'
//
//  Patent: DevHeal Labs AI — NOVA Model Architecture
//  Copyright 2026 DevHeal Labs AI. All rights reserved.
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

service "nova-deploy"
version "1.0.0"

configure:
    port is 8700
    engine_dir is "./nc-engine"
    model_dir is "./nc-ai/nova/model"
    build_dir is "./build"
    artifact_dir is "./artifacts"
    docker_image is "nova-model"
    docker_tag is "latest"
    sign_key_path is "./keys/nova-sign.key"
    health_timeout is 30
    rollback_limit is 5

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  VERSION TRACKING
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

to init:
    purpose: "Initialize deployment state, version history, model presets, and service start time"
    set deploy_state to {
        "current_version": "0.0.0",
        "previous_version": "0.0.0",
        "versions": [],
        "status": "idle",
        "last_deploy": 0,
        "last_error": "",
        "rollback_available": false
    }

    set version_history to []

    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    //  MODEL SIZE PRESETS
    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

    set model_presets to {
        "micro": {

            "max_seq": 256,
            "ff_dim": 256,

            "ram_mb": 50,

        },
        "small": {
            "dim": 128,
            "state_dim": 16,
            "n_layers": 4,
            "vocab_size": 8192,
            "max_seq": 512,
            "ff_dim": 512,
            "graph_dim": 64,
            "n_templates": 32,
            "description": "Small model for mobile and embedded",
            "ram_mb": 150,
            "train_hours": 1
        },
        "base": {
            "dim": 256,
            "state_dim": 32,
            "n_layers": 6,
            "vocab_size": 8192,
            "max_seq": 1024,
            "ff_dim": 1024,
            "graph_dim": 128,
            "n_templates": 64,
            "description": "Default model for general use",
            "ram_mb": 500,
            "train_hours": 4
        },
        "large": {
            "dim": 512,
            "state_dim": 64,
            "n_layers": 12,
            "vocab_size": 16384,
            "max_seq": 2048,
            "ff_dim": 2048,
            "graph_dim": 256,
            "n_templates": 128,
            "description": "Large model for production workloads",
            "ram_mb": 2000,

            "dim": 1024,
            "state_dim": 128,
            "n_layers": 24,
            "vocab_size": 32768,
            "max_seq": 4096,
            "ff_dim": 4096,
