// === FILE: ./nc-ui/cli.nc ===
// NC UI CLI
// Minimal NC-native wrapper around the deterministic compiler services

service "nc-ui-cli"
version "3.2.0"

to compile_source with source:
    fetch "http://localhost:7600/compile" method "POST" body {"source": source} save as result
    respond with result

to compile_file_path with file_path:
    gather source from file_path
    if source is equal nil:
        respond with {"error": "File not found"}
    run compile_source with source
    respond with result

to cmd_build with file_path, output_path:
    run compile_file_path with file_path
    if result.error:
        respond with {"success": false, "error": result.error}

    set out_path to output_path
    if out_path is equal nil or out_path is equal "":
        set out_path to replace(file_path, ".ncui", ".html")

    store result.html into out_path
    respond with {"success": true, "output": out_path, "size": len(result.html)}

to cmd_check with file_path:
    gather source from file_path
    if source is equal nil:
        respond with {"valid": false, "errors": ["File not found"]}
    fetch "http://localhost:7600/validate" method "POST" body {"source": source} save as result
    respond with result

to cmd_tokens with file_path:
    gather source from file_path
    if source is equal nil:
        respond with {"valid": false, "error": "File not found"}
    fetch "http://localhost:7600/tokens" method "POST" body {"source": source} save as result
    respond with result

to cmd_ast with file_path:
    gather source from file_path
    if source is equal nil:
        respond with {"valid": false, "error": "File not found"}
    fetch "http://localhost:7600/ast" method "POST" body {"source": source} save as result
    respond with result

to cmd_build_web with file_path, out_dir:
    fetch "http://localhost:7605/github" method "POST" body {"ncui_file_path": file_path, "out_dir": out_dir} save as result
    respond with result

to cmd_serve with file_path, port:
    set serve_port to port
    if serve_port is equal nil or serve_port is equal "":
        set serve_port to 3000

    run cmd_build with file_path, "./.ncui_serve_temp.html"
    if result.error:
        respond with {"success": false, "error": result.error}

    set serve_service to "service \"ncui-dev\"\nconfigure:\n    port is " + string(serve_port) + "\n\nto serve:\n    gather content from \"./.ncui_serve_temp.html\"\n    respond with content\n\napi:\n    GET / runs serve\n    GET /* runs serve"
    store serve_service into "./.ncui_dev_server.nc"
    set shell_result to exec("nc", "serve", "./.ncui_dev_server.nc")
    respond with {"success": true, "port": serve_port}

to health:
    respond with {"status": "ok", "service": "nc-ui-cli", "version": "3.2.0"}

// === FILE: ./nc-ui/enterprise/forms.nc ===
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  NC UI Enterprise Forms — Written in NC
//
//  Declarative form validation, auto-binding, multi-step,
//  file upload, real-time validation, and error display.
//
//  NC UI form syntax example:
//    form "register" action "/api/users" method "POST":
//        input "Full Name" bind name validate required min-length 2
//        input "Email" type "email" bind email validate email required
//        input "Password" type "password" bind password validate min-length 8 strong-password
//        input "Confirm Password" type "password" bind confirm validate matches password
//        button "Create Account" type "submit" loading state.submitting style "primary"
//
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

service "nc-ui-forms"
version "1.0.0"

configure:
    port is 7603

// ── Validation Rules ───────────────────────────────────────

to define_validation_rules:
    purpose: "Return all available NC UI form validation rules"
    respond with {
        "required":        "Field must not be empty",
        "email":           "Must be a valid email address",
        "min-length":      "Must be at least N characters",
        "max-length":      "Must be at most N characters",
        "min":             "Must be at least N",
        "max":             "Must be at most N",
        "number":          "Must be a valid number",
        "integer":         "Must be a whole number",
        "alpha":           "Must contain only letters",
        "alphanumeric":    "Must contain only letters and numbers",
        "url":             "Must be a valid URL",
        "phone":           "Must be a valid phone number",
        "date":            "Must be a valid date",
        "matches":         "Must match another field",
        "unique":          "Must be unique (checked via API)",
        "strong-password": "Must have uppercase, lowercase, number, symbol, 8+ chars",
        "no-sql":          "Must not contain SQL injection patterns",
        "no-script":       "Must not contain script tags or JS",
        "file-type":       "File must be one of the allowed types",
        "file-size":       "File must be smaller than N MB",
        "custom":          "Custom validation function"
    }

// ── Form JS Generator ──────────────────────────────────────

to generate_forms_js:
    purpose: "Generate enterprise form validation JavaScript"
    respond with "// NC UI Enterprise Forms\n(function(window) {\n'use strict';\nconst NCUIForms = {\n  // Validation rules\n  _rules: {\n    required: (v) => v !== null && v !== undefined && String(v).trim().length > 0 ? null : 'This field is required',\n    email: (v) => /^[a-zA-Z0-9.!#$%&'*+/=?^_`{|}~-]+@[a-zA-Z0-9](?:[a-zA-Z0-9-]{0,61}[a-zA-Z0-9])?(?:\\.[a-zA-Z0-9](?:[a-zA-Z0-9-]{0,61}[a-zA-Z0-9])?)*$/.test(String(v)) ? null : 'Invalid email address',\n    url: (v) => { try { new URL(v); return null; } catch { return 'Invalid URL'; } },\n    number: (v) => !isNaN(parseFloat(v)) && isFinite(v) ? null : 'Must be a number',\n    integer: (v) => Number.isInteger(Number(v)) ? null : 'Must be a whole number',\n    alpha: (v) => /^[a-zA-Z\\s]+$/.test(String(v)) ? null : 'Must contain only letters',\n    alphanumeric: (v) => /^[a-zA-Z0-9]+$/.test(String(v)) ? null : 'Must contain only letters and numbers',\n    phone: (v) => /^[+]?[(]?[0-9]{1,4}[)]?[-\\s./0-9]{6,14}$/.test(String(v)) ? null : 'Invalid phone number',\n    'min-length': (v, n) => String(v).length >= parseInt(n) ? null : `Must be at least ${n} characters`,\n    'max-length': (v, n) => String(v).length <= parseInt(n) ? null : `Must be at most ${n} characters`,\n    'min': (v, n) => parseFloat(v) >= parseFloat(n) ? null : `Must be at least ${n}`,\n    'max': (v, n) => parseFloat(v) <= parseFloat(n) ? null : `Must be at most ${n}`,\n    'strong-password': (v) => {\n      const errors = [];\n      if (v.length < 8) errors.push('at least 8 characters');\n      if (!/[A-Z]/.test(v)) errors.push('an uppercase letter');\n      if (!/[a-z]/.test(v)) errors.push('a lowercase letter');\n      if (!/[0-9]/.test(v)) errors.push('a number');\n      if (!/[^A-Za-z0-9]/.test(v)) errors.push('a special character');\n      return errors.length === 0 ? null : 'Password must have: ' + errors.join(', ');\n    },\n    'no-sql': (v) => {\n      const patterns = [/('|(\\\\')|;|--|(\\/\\*)|(\\*\\/)|xp_|UNION|SELECT|INSERT|UPDATE|DELETE|DROP|ALTER|EXEC|EXECUTE)/i];\n      return patterns.every(p => !p.test(String(v))) ? null : 'Invalid characters detected';\n    },\n    'no-script': (v) => /<script|javascript:|on[a-z]+=|eval\\(/i.test(String(v)) ? 'Invalid content detected' : null,\n    'file-size': (file, mb) => file.size <= parseFloat(mb) * 1024 * 1024 ? null : `File must be smaller than ${mb}MB`,\n    'file-type': (file, types) => {\n      const allowed = types.split(',').map(t => t.trim().toLowerCase());\n      const ext = file.name.split('.').pop().toLowerCase();\n      return allowed.includes(ext) || allowed.includes(file.type) ? null : `File must be: ${types}`;\n    }\n  },\n  // Form state\n  _forms: {},\n  // Register a form\n  register(id, schema) {\n    this._forms[id] = { schema, errors: {}, dirty: {}, touched: {}, submitting: false };\n    return this;\n  },\n  // Validate a single field\n  validateField(formId, field, value) {\n    const form = this._forms[formId];\n    if (!form) return null;\n    const rules = form.schema[field]?.rules || [];\n    for (const [rule, ...args] of rules) {\n      const fn = this._rules[rule];\n      if (!fn) continue;\n      const error = fn(value, ...args);\n      if (error) {\n        this._setError(formId, field, error);\n        return error;\n      }\n    }\n    this._clearError(formId, field);\n    return null;\n  },\n  // Validate matches rule\n  validateMatches(formId, field, matchField) {\n    const form = this._forms[formId];\n    const el1 = document.querySelector(`[data-form-id=\"${formId}\"] [data-form-field=\"${field}\"]`);\n    const el2 = document.querySelector(`[data-form-id=\"${formId}\"] [data-form-field=\"${matchField}\"]`);\n    if (el1?.value !== el2?.value) {\n      this._setError(formId, field, `Must match ${matchField}`);\n      return false;\n    }\n    this._clearError(formId, field);\n    return true;\n  },\n  // Validate entire form\n  validateAll(formId) {\n    const form = this._forms[formId];\n    if (!form) return true;\n    let valid = true;\n    const fields = document.querySelectorAll(`[data-form-id=\"${formId}\"] [data-form-field]`);\n    fields.forEach(el => {\n      const field = el.dataset.formField;\n      const error = this.validateField(formId, field, el.value);\n      if (error) valid = false;\n    });\n    return valid;\n  },\n  // Error display\n  _setError(formId, field, msg) {\n    const el = document.querySelector(`[data-form-id=\"${formId}\"] [data-form-field=\"${field}\"]`);\n    if (el) {\n      el.classList.add('error');\n      let err = el.parentElement?.querySelector('.ncui-field-error');\n      if (!err) { err = document.createElement('span'); err.className = 'ncui-field-error'; el.parentElement?.appendChild(err); }\n      err.textContent = msg;\n    }\n  },\n  _clearError(formId, field) {\n    const el = document.querySelector(`[data-form-id=\"${formId}\"] [data-form-field=\"${field}\"]`);\n    if (el) {\n      el.classList.remove('error');\n      el.parentElement?.querySelector('.ncui-field-error')?.remove();\n    }\n  },\n  // Real-time validation binding\n  bind(formId) {\n    const form = document.querySelector(`[data-form-id=\"${formId}\"]`);\n    if (!form) return;\n    form.querySelectorAll('[data-form-field]').forEach(el => {\n      el.addEventListener('blur', () => {\n        const field = el.dataset.formField;\n        const matchField = el.dataset.formMatches;\n        if (matchField) this.validateMatches(formId, field, matchField);\n        else this.validateField(formId, field, el.value);\n      });\n      el.addEventListener('input', () => {\n        if (this._forms[formId]?.dirty?.[el.dataset.formField]) {\n          this.validateField(formId, el.dataset.formField, el.value);\n        }\n        this._forms[formId] = this._forms[formId] || {};\n        this._forms[formId].dirty = this._forms[formId].dirty || {};\n        this._forms[formId].dirty[el.dataset.formField] = true;\n      });\n    });\n  },\n  // Password strength indicator\n  showStrength(inputSelector, indicatorSelector) {\n    const input = document.querySelector(inputSelector);\n    const indicator = document.querySelector(indicatorSelector);\n    if (!input || !indicator) return;\n    input.addEventListener('input', () => {\n      const v = input.value;\n      let score = 0;\n      if (v.length >= 8) score++;\n      if (/[A-Z]/.test(v)) score++;\n      if (/[a-z]/.test(v)) score++;\n      if (/[0-9]/.test(v)) score++;\n      if (/[^A-Za-z0-9]/.test(v)) score++;\n      const levels = ['', 'Very Weak', 'Weak', 'Fair', 'Strong', 'Very Strong'];\n      const colors = ['', '#ef4444', '#f59e0b', '#eab308', '#10b981', '#059669'];\n      indicator.textContent = levels[score];\n      indicator.style.color = colors[score];\n    });\n  }\n};\nwindow.NCUIForms = NCUIForms;\n})(window);"

// ── Multi-Step Form Generator ──────────────────────────────

to generate_multistep_html with steps, form_id:
    purpose: "Generate HTML for a multi-step form wizard"
    set steps_nav to "<div class=\"ncui-steps-nav\">\n"
    set steps_content to ""

    set step_idx to 0
    repeat for each step in steps:
        set is_first to step_idx is equal 0
        set active_class to ""
        if is_first:
            set active_class to " active"
        set steps_nav to steps_nav + "<div class=\"ncui-step-indicator" + active_class + "\" data-step=\"" + string(step_idx) + "\">\n<span class=\"ncui-step-num\">" + string(step_idx + 1) + "</span>\n<span class=\"ncui-step-label\">" + step.title + "</span>\n</div>\n"

        set inputs_html to ""
        repeat for each field in step.fields:
            set inputs_html to inputs_html + "<div class=\"ncui-field\">\n<label class=\"ncui-label\">" + field.label + "</label>\n<input class=\"ncui-input\" type=\"" + (field.type or "text") + "\" name=\"" + field.name + "\" data-form-field=\"" + field.name + "\" placeholder=\"" + (field.placeholder or field.label) + "\">\n</div>\n"

        set prev_btn to ""
        if step_idx is above 0:
            set prev_btn to "<button type=\"button\" class=\"ncui-button ncui-button-secondary\" data-ncui-action=\"stepPrev\">← Back</button>\n"
        set next_btn to ""
        if step_idx is below len(steps) - 1:
            set next_btn to "<button type=\"button\" class=\"ncui-button ncui-button-primary\" data-ncui-action=\"stepNext\">Continue →</button>\n"
        otherwise:
            set next_btn to "<button type=\"submit\" class=\"ncui-button ncui-button-primary full-width\">Submit</button>\n"

        set steps_content to steps_content + "<div class=\"ncui-step-panel" + active_class + "\" data-step-panel=\"" + string(step_idx) + "\">\n<h3 class=\"ncui-subheading\">" + step.title + "</h3>\n" + inputs_html + "<div class=\"ncui-form-actions\">" + prev_btn + next_btn + "</div>\n</div>\n"

        set step_idx to step_idx + 1

    set steps_nav to steps_nav + "</div>\n"

    set full_html to "<div class=\"ncui-multistep\" data-form-id=\"" + form_id + "\">\n" + steps_nav + "<form class=\"ncui-form\" id=\"" + form_id + "\" data-form-id=\"" + form_id + "\">\n" + steps_content + "</form>\n</div>\n<script>\n(function() {\nlet currentStep = 0;\nconst panels = document.querySelectorAll('[data-step-panel]');\nconst indicators = document.querySelectorAll('[data-step-indicator], .ncui-step-indicator');\nfunction goTo(step) {\n  panels.forEach((p, i) => p.classList.toggle('active', i === step));\n  indicators.forEach((ind, i) => { ind.classList.toggle('active', i === step); ind.classList.toggle('done', i < step); });\n  currentStep = step;\n}\nwindow.stepNext = () => {\n  if (NCUIForms && !NCUIForms.validateAll('" + form_id + "')) return;\n  if (currentStep < panels.length - 1) goTo(currentStep + 1);\n};\nwindow.stepPrev = () => { if (currentStep > 0) goTo(currentStep - 1); };\n}());\n</script>"

    respond with full_html

// ── API ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

api:
    GET  /rules           runs define_validation_rules
    POST /generate/js     runs generate_forms_js
    POST /generate/multistep runs generate_multistep_html
    GET  /health          runs health

to health:
    respond with {"status": "ok", "service": "nc-ui-forms", "version": "1.0.0", "written_in": "NC"}

// === FILE: ./nc-ui/enterprise/state.nc ===
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  NC UI Enterprise State Manager — Written in NC
//
//  Enterprise state management for NC UI apps.
//  Features: reactive state, computed, watchers, middleware,
//  time-travel debugging, persistence, history.
//
//  Like Vuex/Redux/Pinia but in NC syntax.
//
//  Used by compiler.nc to generate state JS in compiled HTML.
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

service "nc-ui-state"
version "1.0.0"

configure:
    port is 7602

// ── State Schema ───────────────────────────────────────────

to define_state_schema with fields:
    purpose: "Define typed state schema with defaults and validators"
    set schema to {}
    repeat for each field in fields:
        set schema[field.key] to {
            default:     field.default,
            type:        field.type or "any",
            validator:   field.validator or nil,
            persistent:  field.persistent or false,
            private:     field.private or false
        }
    respond with schema

// ── State Code Generator ───────────────────────────────────

to generate_state_js with schema, middleware_list:
    purpose: "Generate enterprise reactive state JavaScript"
    set initial_state to {}
    set persist_keys to []

    if schema is not equal nil:
        repeat for each key in schema:
            set field to schema[key]
            set initial_state[key] to field.default
            if field.persistent:
                append key to persist_keys

    respond with "// NC UI Enterprise State Manager\n(function(window) {\n'use strict';\nclass NCUIStateManager {\n  constructor(initial = {}) {\n    this._state = { ...initial };\n    this._watchers = {};\n    this._computed = {};\n    this._middleware = [];\n    this._history = [];\n    this._maxHistory = 50;\n    this._persistKeys = " + string(persist_keys) + ";\n    this._schema = " + string(schema or {}) + ";\n    this._loadPersisted();\n  }\n  // Core get/set\n  get(key) { return key ? this._state[key] : { ...this._state }; }\n  set(key, value) {\n    const validated = this._validate(key, value);\n    if (!validated.ok) { console.warn(`State validation failed for '${key}':`, validated.error); return this; }\n    const old = this._state[key];\n    const payload = { key, value, old };\n    const processed = this._middleware.reduce((p, m) => m(p, this), payload);\n    this._history.push({ ts: Date.now(), key, old, value: processed.value });\n    if (this._history.length > this._maxHistory) this._history.shift();\n    this._state[processed.key] = processed.value;\n    this._notify(processed.key, processed.value, old);\n    this._updateDOM(processed.key, processed.value);\n    if (this._persistKeys.includes(key)) this._persist(key, processed.value);\n    NCUISecurity?.audit?.record('state:change', { key, hasOld: old !== undefined });\n    return this;\n  }\n  update(key, fn) { return this.set(key, fn(this.get(key))); }\n  addTo(key, item) {\n    const arr = [...(this.get(key) || []), item];\n    return this.set(key, arr);\n  }\n  removeFrom(key, predicate) {\n    const arr = (this.get(key) || []).filter(\n      typeof predicate === 'function' ? predicate : (_, i) => i !== predicate\n    );\n    return this.set(key, arr);\n  }\n  updateIn(key, pred, updater) {\n    const arr = (this.get(key) || []).map(item => pred(item) ? { ...item, ...updater(item) } : item);\n    return this.set(key, arr);\n  }\n  toggle(key) { return this.set(key, !this.get(key)); }\n  reset(key) {\n    const schema = this._schema[key];\n    return schema ? this.set(key, schema.default) : this;\n  }\n  resetAll() {\n    Object.keys(this._schema).forEach(key => this.reset(key));\n    return this;\n  }\n  // Computed\n  computed(name, fn, deps) {\n    this._computed[name] = { fn, deps };\n    const update = () => {\n      const val = fn(this.get());\n      this._state[name] = val;\n      this._notify(name, val, undefined);\n      this._updateDOM(name, val);\n    };\n    deps.forEach(dep => this.watch(dep, update));\n    update();\n    return this;\n  }\n  // Watch\n  watch(key, fn, opts = {}) {\n    if (!this._watchers[key]) this._watchers[key] = [];\n    const w = { fn, immediate: opts.immediate, once: opts.once };\n    this._watchers[key].push(w);\n    if (opts.immediate) fn(this.get(key), undefined);\n    return () => { this._watchers[key] = this._watchers[key].filter(x => x !== w); };\n  }\n  watchAll(fn) { return this.watch('*', fn); }\n  // Middleware\n  use(fn) { this._middleware.push(fn); return this; }\n  // Time travel\n  undo() {\n    const entry = this._history.pop();\n    if (entry) { this._state[entry.key] = entry.old; this._notify(entry.key, entry.old, entry.value); this._updateDOM(entry.key, entry.old); }\n    return this;\n  }\n  getHistory() { return [...this._history]; }\n  // Persistence\n  _persist(key, value) {\n    try { localStorage.setItem('ncui_state_' + key, JSON.stringify(value)); } catch {}\n  }\n  _loadPersisted() {\n    this._persistKeys.forEach(key => {\n      try {\n        const v = localStorage.getItem('ncui_state_' + key);\n        if (v !== null) this._state[key] = JSON.parse(v);\n      } catch {}\n    });\n  }\n  // Validation\n  _validate(key, value) {\n    const schema = this._schema[key];\n    if (!schema) return { ok: true };\n    if (schema.type && schema.type !== 'any') {\n      const t = Array.isArray(value) ? 'array' : typeof value;\n      if (t !== schema.type && value !== null && value !== undefined) {\n        return { ok: false, error: `Expected ${schema.type}, got ${t}` };\n      }\n    }\n    if (schema.validator) {\n      try { const r = schema.validator(value); if (r !== true) return { ok: false, error: r }; } catch(e) { return { ok: false, error: e.message }; }\n    }\n    return { ok: true };\n  }\n  // DOM sync\n  _notify(key, value, old) {\n    (this._watchers[key] || []).forEach(w => {\n      if (w.once) this._watchers[key] = this._watchers[key].filter(x => x !== w);\n      w.fn(value, old);\n    });\n    (this._watchers['*'] || []).forEach(w => w.fn({ key, value, old }));\n  }\n  _updateDOM(key, value) {\n    document.querySelectorAll(`[data-ncui-bind=\"${key}\"]`).forEach(el => {\n      if (el.tagName === 'INPUT' || el.tagName === 'TEXTAREA' || el.tagName === 'SELECT') {\n        if (el !== document.activeElement) el.value = value ?? '';\n      } else {\n        el.textContent = value ?? '';\n      }\n    });\n    document.querySelectorAll(`[data-ncui-show=\"${key}\"]`).forEach(el => { el.style.display = value ? '' : 'none'; });\n    document.querySelectorAll(`[data-ncui-hide=\"${key}\"]`).forEach(el => { el.style.display = value ? 'none' : ''; });\n    document.querySelectorAll(`[data-ncui-text=\"${key}\"]`).forEach(el => { el.textContent = value ?? ''; });\n    document.querySelectorAll(`[data-ncui-html=\"${key}\"]`).forEach(el => { el.innerHTML = NCUISecurity?.xss?.sanitize(String(value ?? '')); });\n    document.querySelectorAll(`[data-ncui-class-if]`).forEach(el => {\n      const [cls, sKey] = (el.dataset.ncuiClassIf || '').split(':');\n      if (sKey === key) el.classList.toggle(cls, !!value);\n    });\n    document.querySelectorAll(`[data-ncui-loading=\"${key}\"]`).forEach(el => {\n      el.disabled = !!value;\n      el.setAttribute('data-loading', value ? 'true' : 'false');\n      if (value) {\n        el.dataset.originalText = el.textContent;\n        el.textContent = el.dataset.loadingText || 'Loading...';\n      } else if (el.dataset.originalText) {\n        el.textContent = el.dataset.originalText;\n      }\n    });\n  }\n}\nconst NCUIState = new NCUIStateManager(" + string(initial_state) + ");\nwindow.NCUIState = NCUIState;\n})(window);"

// ── Store Actions ──────────────────────────────────────────

to generate_actions_js with actions:
    purpose: "Generate action handlers for state mutations"
    if actions is equal nil or len(actions) is equal 0:
        respond with "// No actions defined"

    set js to "// NC UI Actions\n(function(window) {\n'use strict';\nconst NCUIActions = {\n"

    repeat for each action in actions:
        set js to js + "  async " + action.name + "(payload) {\n"
        if action.sets is not equal nil:
            repeat for each setter in action.sets:
                set js to js + "    NCUIState.set('" + setter.key + "', " + setter.value + ");\n"
        if action.fetch_url is not equal nil:
            set js to js + "    NCUIState.set('loading', true);\n    try {\n      const res = await NCUIAuth.fetch('" + action.fetch_url + "', { method: '" + (action.method or "GET") + "' });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      NCUIState.set('" + (action.save_as or "data") + "', data);\n    } catch (e) {\n      NCUIState.set('error', e.message);\n    } finally {\n      NCUIState.set('loading', false);\n    }\n"
        if action.navigates_to is not equal nil:
            set js to js + "    NCUIRouter.navigate('" + action.navigates_to + "');\n"
        set js to js + "  },\n"

    set js to js + "};\nwindow.NCUIActions = NCUIActions;\n})(window);"
    respond with js

// ── API ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

api:
    POST /schema          runs define_state_schema
    POST /generate/js     runs generate_state_js
    POST /generate/actions runs generate_actions_js
    GET  /health          runs health

to health:
    respond with {"status": "ok", "service": "nc-ui-state", "version": "1.0.0", "written_in": "NC"}

// === FILE: ./nc-ui/enterprise/auth.nc ===
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  NC UI Enterprise Auth Module — Written in NC
//
//  Replaces the JS-based auth in security.js.
//  Handles: Bearer JWT, OAuth 2.0 PKCE, Session, SAML, SSO
//
//  Used by the NC UI compiler to generate auth-aware HTML.
//  Also serves as a standalone auth microservice.
//
//  Start: nc serve nc-ui/enterprise/auth.nc
//  Port:  7601
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

service "nc-ui-auth"
version "1.0.0"

configure:
    port is 7601

// ── Auth Configuration ─────────────────────────────────────

to create_auth_config with type, options:
    purpose: "Create an auth configuration object for NC UI"
    set config to {
        type:             type,
        login_endpoint:   options.login_endpoint or "/api/auth/login",
        logout_endpoint:  options.logout_endpoint or "/api/auth/logout",
        refresh_endpoint: options.refresh_endpoint or "/api/auth/refresh",
        verify_endpoint:  options.verify_endpoint or "/api/auth/verify",
        token_header:     options.token_header or "Authorization",
        token_prefix:     options.token_prefix or "Bearer",
        token_store:      options.token_store or "session",
        on_login:         options.on_login or "/dashboard",
        on_logout:        options.on_logout or "/login",
        session_timeout:  options.session_timeout or 3600,
        refresh_before:   options.refresh_before or 300,
        mfa_enabled:      options.mfa_enabled or false,
        roles:            options.roles or []
    }
    respond with config

// ── JWT Generation ─────────────────────────────────────────
// NOTE: JWT signing must happen on the server.
// This module generates the CLIENT-SIDE auth JS code.

to generate_client_auth_js with config:
    purpose: "Generate client-side authentication JavaScript code for NC UI"
    set type to config.type
    set login_ep to config.login_endpoint
    set logout_ep to config.logout_endpoint
    set refresh_ep to config.refresh_endpoint
    set on_login to config.on_login
    set on_logout to config.on_logout
    set store_type to config.token_store

    // Choose storage strategy
    // session = sessionStorage (tab-scoped, XSS-resistant but not cross-tab)
    // cookie = document.cookie (httpOnly preferred — set by server)
    // memory = in-memory only (most secure, lost on refresh)
    set storage_code to ""
    if store_type is equal "memory":
        set storage_code to "let _token = null;\nconst _store = { get: () => _token, set: t => { _token = t; }, del: () => { _token = null; } };"
    otherwise:
        if store_type is equal "cookie":
            set storage_code to "const _store = {\n  get: () => document.cookie.split('; ').find(r => r.startsWith('ncui_jwt='))?.split('=')[1] || null,\n  set: t => { document.cookie = `ncui_jwt=${t};secure;samesite=strict;path=/`; },\n  del: () => { document.cookie = 'ncui_jwt=;expires=Thu, 01 Jan 1970 00:00:00 UTC;path=/'; }\n};"
        otherwise:
            // session storage default
            set storage_code to "const _store = {\n  get: () => { try { return sessionStorage.getItem('ncui_jwt'); } catch { return null; } },\n  set: t => { try { sessionStorage.setItem('ncui_jwt', t); } catch {} },\n  del: () => { try { sessionStorage.removeItem('ncui_jwt'); } catch {} }\n};"

    respond with "// NC UI Auth — " + type + "\n(function(window) {\n'use strict';\n" + storage_code + "\nconst NCUIAuth = {\n  _config: " + string(config) + ",\n  _refreshTimer: null,\n  _jwt: {\n    decode(t) {\n      try {\n        if (!t || t.split('.').length !== 3) return null;\n        const p = t.split('.')[1].replace(/-/g,'+').replace(/_/g,'/');\n        return JSON.parse(atob(p.padEnd(p.length + (4 - p.length % 4) % 4, '=')));\n      } catch { return null; }\n    },\n    isExpired(t) {\n      const p = this.decode(t);\n      return !p?.exp || Date.now() / 1000 >= p.exp;\n    },\n    expiresIn(t) {\n      const p = this.decode(t);\n      return p?.exp ? Math.max(0, p.exp - Date.now() / 1000) : 0;\n    }\n  },\n  async login(credentials) {\n    NCUISecurity?.audit?.record('auth:login_attempt', { email: credentials.email });\n    const csrfToken = NCUISecurity?.csrf?.generate() || '';\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch('" + login_ep + "', {\n        method: 'POST',\n        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'X-CSRF-Token': csrfToken },\n        credentials: 'include',\n        body: JSON.stringify(credentials)\n      });\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        const err = await res.json().catch(() => ({ message: 'Login failed' }));\n        throw new Error(err.message || 'Login failed');\n      }\n      const data = await res.json();\n      const token = data.token || data.access_token;\n      if (token) {\n        _store.set(token);\n        this._scheduleRefresh(token);\n      }\n      NCUIState?.set('user', this.getUser());\n      NCUIState?.set('authenticated', true);\n      NCUISecurity?.audit?.record('auth:login_success', { user: this.getUser()?.email });\n      NCUIRouter?.navigate('" + on_login + "');\n      return { success: true, user: this.getUser() };\n    } catch (err) {\n      NCUISecurity?.audit?.record('auth:login_failure', { error: err.message });\n      return { success: false, error: err.message };\n    }\n  },\n  async logout() {\n    const user = this.getUser();\n    try {\n      await fetch('" + logout_ep + "', {\n        method: 'POST',\n        headers: { ...this.getHeaders(), 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n        credentials: 'include'\n      });\n    } catch {}\n    clearTimeout(this._refreshTimer);\n    _store.del();\n    NCUIState?.set('user', null);\n    NCUIState?.set('authenticated', false);\n    NCUISecurity?.audit?.record('auth:logout', { user: user?.email });\n    NCUIRouter?.navigate('" + on_logout + "');\n  },\n  async refresh() {\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch('" + refresh_ep + "', {\n        method: 'POST',\n        headers: { ...this.getHeaders(), 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n        credentials: 'include'\n      });\n      if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Refresh failed');\n      const data = await res.json();\n      const token = data.token || data.access_token;\n      if (token) {\n        _store.set(token);\n        this._scheduleRefresh(token);\n        NCUISecurity?.audit?.record('auth:token_refreshed', {});\n      }\n    } catch {\n      await this.logout();\n    }\n  },\n  _scheduleRefresh(token) {\n    clearTimeout(this._refreshTimer);\n    const expiresIn = this._jwt.expiresIn(token);\n    const refreshIn = Math.max(0, (expiresIn - " + string(config.refresh_before) + ") * 1000);\n    if (refreshIn > 0) {\n      this._refreshTimer = setTimeout(() => this.refresh(), refreshIn);\n    }\n  },\n  isAuthenticated() {\n    const t = _store.get();\n    return !!t && !this._jwt.isExpired(t);\n  },\n  getUser() {\n    const t = _store.get();\n    if (!t) return null;\n    const claims = this._jwt.decode(t);\n    return claims ? { id: claims.sub, name: claims.name, email: claims.email, roles: claims.roles || [], claims } : null;\n  },\n  hasRole(role) {\n    return this.getUser()?.roles?.includes(role) || false;\n  },\n  hasAnyRole(roles) {\n    return roles.some(r => this.hasRole(r));\n  },\n  getHeaders() {\n    const t = _store.get();\n    return t ? { 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + t } : {};\n  },\n  async fetch(url, options = {}) {\n    const headers = { ...this.getHeaders(), 'Content-Type': 'application/json', ...options.headers };\n    let res = await fetch(url, { ...options, headers, credentials: 'include' });\n    if (res.status === 401) {\n      await this.refresh();\n      if (!this.isAuthenticated()) { NCUIRouter?.navigate('" + on_logout + "'); return res; }\n      headers['Authorization'] = 'Bearer ' + (_store.get() || '');\n      res = await fetch(url, { ...options, headers, credentials: 'include' });\n    }\n    return res;\n  },\n  init() {\n    const t = _store.get();\n    if (t && !this._jwt.isExpired(t)) {\n      NCUIState?.set('user', this.getUser());\n      NCUIState?.set('authenticated', true);\n      this._scheduleRefresh(t);\n    } else if (t) {\n      this.refresh();\n    }\n  }\n};\nwindow.NCUIAuth = NCUIAuth;\n})(window);"

// ── Route Guard Generator ──────────────────────────────────

to generate_guards_js with guards_config, roles_config:
    purpose: "Generate route guard JavaScript for NC UI router"
    set guards_js to "// NC UI Route Guards\n(function(window) {\n'use strict';\nconst NCUIGuards = {\n"

    // Standard guards
    set guards_js to guards_js + "  'authenticated': async (route, path) => {\n    if (!NCUIAuth.isAuthenticated()) {\n      NCUISecurity?.audit?.record('guard:auth_required', { path });\n      NCUIRouter.navigate('/login');\n      return false;\n    }\n    return true;\n  },\n"

    // Role-based guards from config
    if guards_config is not equal nil:
        repeat for each guard in guards_config:
            set guards_js to guards_js + "  '" + guard.name + "': async (route, path) => {\n"
            if guard.require_auth:
                set guards_js to guards_js + "    if (!NCUIAuth.isAuthenticated()) { NCUIRouter.navigate('/login'); return false; }\n"
            if guard.require_role is not equal nil:
                set guards_js to guards_js + "    if (!NCUIAuth.hasRole('" + guard.require_role + "')) { NCUIRouter.navigate('" + (guard.redirect or "/403") + "'); return false; }\n"
            if guard.require_any_role is not equal nil:
                set guards_js to guards_js + "    if (!NCUIAuth.hasAnyRole(" + string(guard.require_any_role) + ")) { NCUIRouter.navigate('" + (guard.redirect or "/403") + "'); return false; }\n"
            set guards_js to guards_js + "    return true;\n  },\n"

    set guards_js to guards_js + "};\nwindow.NCUIGuards = NCUIGuards;\n// Register guards with router\nif (window.NCUIRouter) {\n  Object.entries(NCUIGuards).forEach(([name, fn]) => NCUIRouter.guard(name, fn));\n}\n})(window);"

    respond with guards_js

// ── RBAC Generator ────────────────────────────────────────

to generate_rbac_js with roles_config:
    purpose: "Generate Role-Based Access Control JavaScript"
    set rbac_js to "// NC UI RBAC\n(function(window) {\n'use strict';\nconst NCUIRBAC = {\n  _rules: {},\n  define(role, permissions) { this._rules[role] = permissions; return this; },\n  can(action, resource) {\n    const user = NCUIAuth.getUser();\n    if (!user) return false;\n    for (const role of (user.roles || [])) {\n      const perms = this._rules[role] || [];\n      if (perms.includes('*') || perms.includes(action + ':' + resource) || perms.includes(action + ':*')) return true;\n    }\n    return false;\n  },\n  canAccess(path) {\n    const user = NCUIAuth.getUser();\n    if (!user) return false;\n    for (const role of (user.roles || [])) {\n      const perms = this._rules[role] || [];\n      if (perms.includes('*')) return true;\n      if (perms.some(p => path.startsWith(p))) return true;\n    }\n    return false;\n  }\n};\n"

    if roles_config is not equal nil:
        repeat for each role in roles_config:
            set rbac_js to rbac_js + "NCUIRBAC.define('" + role.name + "', " + string(role.permissions) + ");\n"

    set rbac_js to rbac_js + "window.NCUIRBAC = NCUIRBAC;\n})(window);"
    respond with rbac_js

// ── MFA Support ────────────────────────────────────────────

to generate_mfa_js:
    purpose: "Generate TOTP/MFA JavaScript support"
    respond with "// NC UI MFA Support\n(function(window) {\n'use strict';\nconst NCUIMFA = {\n  async verify(code, session) {\n    const res = await fetch('/api/auth/mfa/verify', {\n      method: 'POST',\n      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', ...NCUISecurity.csrf && { 'X-CSRF-Token': NCUISecurity.csrf.generate() } },\n      body: JSON.stringify({ code, session })\n    });\n    if (!res.ok) return { success: false, error: 'Invalid MFA code' };\n    const data = await res.json();\n    if (data.token) { NCUIAuth._jwt && NCUIAuth.init(); }\n    return { success: true };\n  },\n  async setup() {\n    const res = await NCUIAuth.fetch('/api/auth/mfa/setup', { method: 'POST' });\n    return res.json();\n  },\n  async disable() {\n    const res = await NCUIAuth.fetch('/api/auth/mfa/disable', { method: 'DELETE' });\n    return res.json();\n  }\n};\nwindow.NCUIMFA = NCUIMFA;\n})(window);"

// ── OAuth 2.0 PKCE ────────────────────────────────────────

to generate_oauth_js with provider_config:
    purpose: "Generate OAuth 2.0 PKCE flow JavaScript"
    set client_id to provider_config.client_id or "YOUR_CLIENT_ID"
    set auth_endpoint to provider_config.auth_endpoint or "https://auth.example.com/authorize"
    set token_endpoint to provider_config.token_endpoint or "https://auth.example.com/token"
    set redirect_uri to provider_config.redirect_uri or "http://localhost:3000/callback"
    set scopes to provider_config.scopes or ["openid", "profile", "email"]

    respond with "// NC UI OAuth 2.0 PKCE\n(function(window) {\n'use strict';\nconst NCUIOAuth = {\n  async startLogin() {\n    const verifier = this._randomString(64);\n    const challenge = await this._sha256(verifier);\n    sessionStorage.setItem('oauth_verifier', verifier);\n    const state = this._randomString(32);\n    sessionStorage.setItem('oauth_state', state);\n    const params = new URLSearchParams({\n      response_type: 'code',\n      client_id: '" + client_id + "',\n      redirect_uri: '" + redirect_uri + "',\n      scope: '" + join(scopes, " ") + "',\n      state,\n      code_challenge: challenge,\n      code_challenge_method: 'S256'\n    });\n    window.location.href = '" + auth_endpoint + "?' + params;\n  },\n  async handleCallback() {\n    const params = new URLSearchParams(location.search);\n    const code = params.get('code');\n    const state = params.get('state');\n    if (state !== sessionStorage.getItem('oauth_state')) throw new Error('Invalid state');\n    const verifier = sessionStorage.getItem('oauth_verifier');\n    const res = await fetch('" + token_endpoint + "', {\n      method: 'POST',\n      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded' },\n      body: new URLSearchParams({\n        grant_type: 'authorization_code',\n        client_id: '" + client_id + "',\n        redirect_uri: '" + redirect_uri + "',\n        code,\n        code_verifier: verifier\n      })\n    });\n    const data = await res.json();\n    if (data.access_token) NCUIAuth._store?.set(data.access_token);\n    sessionStorage.removeItem('oauth_verifier');\n    sessionStorage.removeItem('oauth_state');\n    NCUIRouter.navigate('/dashboard');\n  },\n  _randomString(len) {\n    const b = new Uint8Array(len);\n    crypto.getRandomValues(b);\n    return btoa(String.fromCharCode(...b)).replace(/\\+/g,'-').replace(/\\//g,'_').replace(/=/g,'').slice(0,len);\n  },\n  async _sha256(str) {\n    const buf = await crypto.subtle.digest('SHA-256', new TextEncoder().encode(str));\n    return btoa(String.fromCharCode(...new Uint8Array(buf))).replace(/\\+/g,'-').replace(/\\//g,'_').replace(/=/g,'');\n  }\n};\nwindow.NCUIOAuth = NCUIOAuth;\n})(window);"

// ── API ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

api:
    POST /config        runs create_auth_config
    POST /generate/js   runs generate_client_auth_js
    POST /generate/guards runs generate_guards_js
    POST /generate/rbac runs generate_rbac_js
    POST /generate/mfa  runs generate_mfa_js
    POST /generate/oauth runs generate_oauth_js
    GET  /health        runs health

to health:
    respond with {"status": "ok", "service": "nc-ui-auth", "version": "1.0.0", "written_in": "NC"}

// === FILE: ./nc-ui/enterprise/rbac.nc ===
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  NC UI Enterprise RBAC — Written in NC
//
//  Role-Based Access Control for NC UI applications.
//  Define roles, permissions, and policy rules in NC syntax.
//
//  NC UI RBAC syntax:
//    roles:
//        "superadmin" can do "*"
//        "admin" can do ["read:*", "write:users", "delete:users"]
//        "manager" can do ["read:*", "write:reports"]
//        "user" can do ["read:dashboard", "read:profile", "write:profile"]
//        "guest" can do ["read:public"]
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

service "nc-ui-rbac"
version "1.0.0"

configure:
    port is 7604
    ai_model is "default"

// ── Permission Model ───────────────────────────────────────

to define_policy with roles:
    purpose: "Define RBAC policy from NC UI roles config"
    set policy to {}
    repeat for each role in roles:
        set policy[role.name] to role.permissions
    respond with policy

to check_permission with policy, user_roles, action, resource:
    purpose: "Check if user has permission to perform action on resource"
    repeat for each role in user_roles:
        set perms to policy[role]
        if perms is not equal nil:
            repeat for each perm in perms:
                if perm is equal "*":
                    respond with {"allowed": true, "reason": "Role " + role + " has wildcard permission"}
                if perm is equal action + ":*":
                    respond with {"allowed": true, "reason": "Role " + role + " has " + action + " on all resources"}
                if perm is equal action + ":" + resource:
                    respond with {"allowed": true, "reason": "Role " + role + " has " + action + " on " + resource}
                if perm is equal "*:" + resource:
                    respond with {"allowed": true, "reason": "Role " + role + " has all actions on " + resource}

    respond with {"allowed": false, "reason": "No matching permission for " + action + ":" + resource}

// ── UI Visibility Control ──────────────────────────────────

to generate_rbac_directives_js:
    purpose: "Generate JS for hiding/showing UI elements based on permissions"
    respond with "// NC UI RBAC Directives\n(function(window) {\n'use strict';\nconst NCUIDirectives = {\n  // Apply all RBAC directives on page load and navigation\n  apply() {\n    this._applyRoleShow();\n    this._applyRoleHide();\n    this._applyPermShow();\n    this._applyRoleDisable();\n  },\n  // data-ncui-role-show=\"admin\" → only show to admins\n  _applyRoleShow() {\n    document.querySelectorAll('[data-ncui-role-show]').forEach(el => {\n      const requiredRole = el.dataset.ncuiRoleShow;\n      el.style.display = NCUIAuth.hasRole(requiredRole) ? '' : 'none';\n    });\n  },\n  // data-ncui-role-hide=\"guest\" → hide from guests\n  _applyRoleHide() {\n    document.querySelectorAll('[data-ncui-role-hide]').forEach(el => {\n      const hiddenRole = el.dataset.ncuiRoleHide;\n      el.style.display = NCUIAuth.hasRole(hiddenRole) ? 'none' : '';\n    });\n  },\n  // data-ncui-perm=\"delete:users\" → show only with permission\n  _applyPermShow() {\n    document.querySelectorAll('[data-ncui-perm]').forEach(el => {\n      const [action, resource] = (el.dataset.ncuiPerm || '').split(':');\n      if (window.NCUIRBAC) {\n        el.style.display = NCUIRBAC.can(action, resource) ? '' : 'none';\n      }\n    });\n  },\n  // data-ncui-role-disable=\"guest\" → disable for guests\n  _applyRoleDisable() {\n    document.querySelectorAll('[data-ncui-role-disable]').forEach(el => {\n      const role = el.dataset.ncuiRoleDisable;\n      el.disabled = NCUIAuth.hasRole(role);\n    });\n  },\n  // data-ncui-auth-show → only show when authenticated\n  _applyAuthShow() {\n    document.querySelectorAll('[data-ncui-auth-show]').forEach(el => {\n      el.style.display = NCUIAuth.isAuthenticated() ? '' : 'none';\n    });\n    document.querySelectorAll('[data-ncui-unauth-show]').forEach(el => {\n      el.style.display = NCUIAuth.isAuthenticated() ? 'none' : '';\n    });\n  }\n};\nwindow.NCUIDirectives = NCUIDirectives;\n// Auto-apply on route change\nif (window.NCUIRouter) {\n  const origNavigate = NCUIRouter.navigate.bind(NCUIRouter);\n  NCUIRouter.navigate = async (...args) => { await origNavigate(...args); NCUIDirectives.apply(); };\n}\ndocument.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => NCUIDirectives.apply());\n})(window);"

// ── Policy Generator ───────────────────────────────────────

to generate_policy_js with policy:
    purpose: "Generate RBAC policy JavaScript from NC UI config"
    set js to "// NC UI RBAC Policy\n(function(window) {\n'use strict';\nconst NCUIRBAC = {\n  _policy: {},\n  define(role, perms) { this._policy[role] = perms; return this; },\n  can(action, resource) {\n    const user = NCUIAuth.getUser();\n    if (!user) return false;\n    for (const role of (user.roles || [])) {\n      const perms = this._policy[role] || [];\n      if (perms.includes('*') || perms.includes(action + ':' + resource) || perms.includes(action + ':*') || perms.includes('*:' + resource)) return true;\n    }\n    return false;\n  },\n  hasRole(role) { return NCUIAuth.hasRole(role); },\n  hasAnyRole(roles) { return NCUIAuth.hasAnyRole(roles); },\n  getPermissions() {\n    const user = NCUIAuth.getUser();\n    if (!user) return [];\n    return (user.roles || []).flatMap(r => this._policy[r] || []);\n  }\n};\n\n// Load policy\n"

    if policy is not equal nil:
        repeat for each role_name in policy:
            set perms to policy[role_name]
            set js to js + "NCUIRBAC.define('" + role_name + "', " + string(perms) + ");\n"

    set js to js + "window.NCUIRBAC = NCUIRBAC;\n})(window);"
    respond with js

// ── Ask AI to generate policy ──────────────────────────────

to suggest_policy with description:
    purpose: "Use AI to suggest an RBAC policy from app description"
    ask AI to "Design an RBAC policy for this application: " + description + "\n\nReturn JSON: {roles: [{name: string, description: string, permissions: [string]}]}\n\nPermissions format: 'action:resource' where action is read/write/delete/admin, resource is the feature name, or '*' for wildcard.\n\nReturn 4-6 typical enterprise roles." save as policy

    respond with policy

// ── API ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

api:
    POST /define            runs define_policy
    POST /check             runs check_permission
    POST /generate/js       runs generate_rbac_directives_js
    POST /generate/policy   runs generate_policy_js
    POST /suggest           runs suggest_policy
    GET  /health            runs health

to health:
    respond with {"status": "ok", "service": "nc-ui-rbac", "version": "1.0.0", "written_in": "NC"}

// === FILE: ./nc-ui/runtime/ncui-js-emitter.nc ===
// NC UI Static Export Service
// Deterministic export wrapper around compiler_bridge.js

service "nc-ui-static-export"
version "3.2.0"

configure:
    port is 7605

to emit_html with ncui_file_path:
    if ncui_file_path is equal nil or ncui_file_path is equal "":
        respond with {"success": false, "error": "Missing file path"}

    set compile_result to exec("node", "./nc-ui/compiler_bridge.js", "compile-file", ncui_file_path)
    if compile_result.error:
        respond with {"success": false, "error": compile_result.error}

    set out_path to replace(ncui_file_path, ".ncui", ".html")
    store compile_result.html into out_path
    respond with {"success": true, "output": out_path, "size": len(compile_result.html), "warnings": compile_result.warnings}

to prepare_github_pages with ncui_file_path, out_dir:
    if ncui_file_path is equal nil or ncui_file_path is equal "":
        respond with {"success": false, "error": "Missing file path"}

    set dir to out_dir
    if dir is equal nil or dir is equal "":
        set dir to "./dist"

    set compile_result to exec("node", "./nc-ui/compiler_bridge.js", "compile-file", ncui_file_path)
    if compile_result.error:
        respond with {"success": false, "error": compile_result.error}

    store compile_result.html into dir + "/index.html"
    respond with {"success": true, "dir": dir, "warnings": compile_result.warnings}

to health:
    respond with {"status": "ok", "service": "nc-ui-static-export", "version": "3.2.0", "target": "static-html"}

api:
    POST /emit   runs emit_html
    POST /github runs prepare_github_pages
    GET /health  runs health

// === FILE: ./nc-ui/compiler.nc ===
// NC UI Compiler Service
// Deterministic NC wrapper around compiler_bridge.js

service "nc-ui-compiler"
version "3.2.0"

configure:
    port is 7600

to compile with source:
    if source is equal nil or source is equal "":
        respond with {"error": "Empty source", "html": "", "valid": false}
    set result to exec("node", "./nc-ui/compiler_bridge.js", "compile", source)
    respond with result

to compile_file with path:
    if path is equal nil or path is equal "":
        respond with {"error": "Missing path", "html": "", "valid": false}
    set result to exec("node", "./nc-ui/compiler_bridge.js", "compile-file", path)
    respond with result

to get_tokens with source:
    if source is equal nil:
        respond with {"error": "Empty source", "tokens": [], "count": 0, "valid": false}
    set result to exec("node", "./nc-ui/compiler_bridge.js", "tokens", source)
    respond with result

to get_ast with source:
    if source is equal nil:
        respond with {"error": "Empty source", "ast": {}, "valid": false}
    set result to exec("node", "./nc-ui/compiler_bridge.js", "ast", source)
    respond with result

to validate_source with source:
    if source is equal nil or source is equal "":
        respond with {"valid": false, "errors": ["Empty source"], "warnings": [], "token_count": 0}
    set result to exec("node", "./nc-ui/compiler_bridge.js", "validate", source)
    respond with result

to health:
    respond with {"status": "ok", "service": "nc-ui-compiler", "version": "3.2.0", "target": "deterministic-js-runtime"}

api:
    POST /compile      runs compile
    POST /compile/file runs compile_file
    POST /tokens       runs get_tokens
    POST /ast          runs get_ast
    POST /validate     runs validate_source
    GET /health        runs health

// === FILE: ./start.nc ===
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  DevHeal Labs AI — Master Launcher (NC Version)
//
//  Replaces start.sh — Written in NC, not bash.
//  Works on Windows, macOS, and Linux.
//
//  Usage:
//    nc start.nc                   Interactive menu
//    nc start.nc build             Build NC engine
//    nc start.nc test              Run all tests
//    nc start.nc hiveant           Start HiveANT
//    nc start.nc swarmops          Start SwarmOps
//    nc start.nc neuraledge        Start NeuralEdge stock service
//    nc start.nc nc-ai             Start NC AI Native server
//    nc start.nc stock             Start stock market app (NC UI + backend)
//    nc start.nc portal            Preview DevHeal portal (NC UI)
//    nc start.nc all               Start all services
//    nc start.nc status            Show project status
//
//  Windows:  nc.exe start.nc
//  macOS:    nc start.nc
//  Linux:    nc start.nc
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

service "nc-launcher"
version "1.0.0"

import "subprocess"
import "os"

// ── Paths ──────────────────────────────────────────────────

let paths = {
    nc_engine:       "./nc-lang/engine",
    hiveant:         "./hiveant/server.nc",
    swarmops:        "./swarmops/server.nc",
    neuraledge:      "./nc-apps/stock-market/backend/stock_service.nc",
    nc_ai_native:    "./nc-ai-native/server.nc",
    portal_ui:       "./nc-apps/devheal-portal/ui/portal.ncui",
    stock_ui:        "./nc-apps/stock-market/ui/stock_dashboard.ncui",
    hiveant_ui:      "./nc-apps/hiveant-dashboard/ui/hiveant_dashboard.ncui",
    swarmops_ui:     "./nc-apps/swarmops-dashboard/ui/swarmops_dashboard.ncui",
    nc_ui_compiler:  "./nc-ui/cli.js"
}

// ── Platform ───────────────────────────────────────────────

to detect_platform:
    set win_os to env("OS")
    if win_os is not equal nil:
        if contains(win_os, "Windows"):
            respond with "windows"
    set ostype to env("OSTYPE")
    if ostype is not equal nil:
        if contains(ostype, "darwin"):
            respond with "macos"
    respond with "linux"

to get_nc_binary:
    run detect_platform
    set platform to result
    if platform is equal "windows":
        if os.exists("./nc-lang/engine/build/nc.exe"):
            respond with "./nc-lang/engine/build/nc.exe"
        respond with "nc.exe"
    otherwise:
        if os.exists("./nc-lang/engine/build/nc"):
            respond with "./nc-lang/engine/build/nc"
        respond with "nc"

// ── Banner ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

to show_banner:
    log ""
    log "  ╔══════════════════════════════════════════════╗"
    log "  ║      DevHeal Labs AI — NC Launcher           ║"
    log "  ║   Written in NC Language — Not Shell/Bash    ║"
    log "  ╚══════════════════════════════════════════════╝"
    log ""
    respond with true

// ── Build Engine ───────────────────────────────────────────

to build_engine:
    purpose: "Build the NC engine (only C component)"
    log "Building NC engine..."
    log "(Only the engine is C — everything else is NC)"
    log ""

    if os.exists(paths.nc_engine + "/Makefile"):
        run subprocess.run with "make -C " + paths.nc_engine + " clean"
        run subprocess.run with "make -C " + paths.nc_engine
        log "NC engine built."
        respond with {"success": true}
    otherwise:
        log "ERROR: Makefile not found"
        respond with {"success": false, "error": "No Makefile"}

// ── Start Services ─────────────────────────────────────────

to start_hiveant:
    purpose: "Start HiveANT autonomous incident response"
    log "Starting HiveANT on port 7700..."
    run get_nc_binary
    set nc_bin to result
    run subprocess.run with nc_bin + " serve " + paths.hiveant
    respond with {"service": "hiveant", "port": 7700}

to start_swarmops:
    purpose: "Start SwarmOps operations platform"
    log "Starting SwarmOps on port 7800..."
    run get_nc_binary
    set nc_bin to result
    run subprocess.run with nc_bin + " serve " + paths.swarmops
    respond with {"service": "swarmops", "port": 7800}

to start_neuraledge:
    purpose: "Start NeuralEdge stock intelligence service"
    log "Starting NeuralEdge (Stock Market AI) on port 8000..."
    run get_nc_binary
    set nc_bin to result
    run subprocess.run with nc_bin + " serve " + paths.neuraledge
    respond with {"service": "neuraledge", "port": 8000}

to start_nc_ai:
    purpose: "Start NC AI Native server (AI written in NC)"
    log "Starting NC AI Native on port 8090..."
    log "(This AI is written IN NC — not in C!)"
    run get_nc_binary
    set nc_bin to result
    run subprocess.run with nc_bin + " serve " + paths.nc_ai_native
    respond with {"service": "nc-ai-native", "port": 8090}

// ── Preview NC UI Apps ─────────────────────────────────────

to compile_and_preview_ui with ncui_file, port:
    purpose: "Compile NC UI file and serve on port"
    log "Compiling NC UI: " + ncui_file
    run subprocess.run with "node " + paths.nc_ui_compiler + " build " + ncui_file
    log "Serving on http://localhost:" + string(port)
    run subprocess.run with "node " + paths.nc_ui_compiler + " serve " + ncui_file + " --port " + string(port)
    respond with {"file": ncui_file, "port": port}

to preview_stock_ui:
    purpose: "Preview stock market NC UI dashboard"
    run compile_and_preview_ui with paths.stock_ui, 9001
    respond with result

to preview_portal:
    purpose: "Preview DevHeal Labs portal NC UI"
    run compile_and_preview_ui with paths.portal_ui, 9000
    respond with result

to preview_hiveant_ui:
    purpose: "Preview HiveANT dashboard NC UI"
    run compile_and_preview_ui with paths.hiveant_ui, 9002
    respond with result

to preview_swarmops_ui:
    purpose: "Preview SwarmOps dashboard NC UI"
    run compile_and_preview_ui with paths.swarmops_ui, 9003
    respond with result

// ── Start Stock Market Full App ────────────────────────────

to start_stock_market:
    purpose: "Start stock market app — NC UI + NC backend"
    log ""
    log "Starting NeuralEdge Stock Market App"
    log "  Backend (NC): http://localhost:8000"
    log "  Frontend (NC UI): http://localhost:9001"
    log ""

    // Start backend service
    run get_nc_binary
    set nc_bin to result
    // Note: in production run in background
    run subprocess.run with nc_bin + " serve " + paths.neuraledge

    respond with {
        "backend":  "http://localhost:8000",
        "frontend": "http://localhost:9001"
    }

// ── Run Tests ──────────────────────────────────────────────

to run_tests:
    purpose: "Run all NC tests"
    log "Running all NC tests..."
    run get_nc_binary
    set nc_bin to result
    run subprocess.run with "NC_ACCEPT_LICENSE=1 " + nc_bin + " test ./nc-lang/tests"
    log "Core language tests done."

    // Also run NC AI native tests
    run subprocess.run with nc_bin + " ./nc-ai-native/tests/test_model.nc"
    log "NC AI tests done."

    respond with {"success": true}

// ── Status ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

to show_status:
    purpose: "Show status of all projects"
    log ""
    log "  DevHeal Labs AI — Project Status"
    log "  ─────────────────────────────────────────────────"
    log ""

    run get_nc_binary
    set nc_bin to result

    // NC Engine
    if os.exists(nc_bin):
        log "  NC Engine          BUILT   " + nc_bin
    otherwise:
        log "  NC Engine          NOT BUILT — nc start.nc build"

    // NC AI Native (NC language — no build)
    if os.exists("./nc-ai-native/server.nc"):
        log "  NC AI Native       READY   (NC — no compilation)"
    otherwise:
        log "  NC AI Native       MISSING"

    // HiveANT
    if os.exists(paths.hiveant):
        log "  HiveANT            READY   " + paths.hiveant
    otherwise:
        log "  HiveANT            MISSING"

    // SwarmOps
    if os.exists(paths.swarmops):
        log "  SwarmOps           READY   " + paths.swarmops
    otherwise:
        log "  SwarmOps           MISSING"

    // NC Apps
    if os.exists("./nc-apps"):
        log "  NC Apps            READY   (stock market, hiveant, swarmops UIs)"
    otherwise:
        log "  NC Apps            MISSING"

    // NC Scripts
    if os.exists("./nc-scripts"):
        log "  NC Scripts         READY   (build.nc, test.nc, install.nc)"
    otherwise:
        log "  NC Scripts         MISSING"

    log ""
    log "  Services:"
    log "    HiveANT      → http://localhost:7700"
    log "    SwarmOps     → http://localhost:7800"
    log "    NeuralEdge   → http://localhost:8000"
    log "    NC AI Native → http://localhost:8090"
    log ""
    log "  NC UI Apps (previews):"
    log "    DevHeal Portal   → http://localhost:9000"
    log "    Stock Market     → http://localhost:9001"
    log "    HiveANT UI       → http://localhost:9002"
    log "    SwarmOps UI      → http://localhost:9003"
    log ""

    respond with {"status": "ok"}

// ── Start All ──────────────────────────────────────────────

to start_all:
    purpose: "Build and start all services"
    run show_banner

    // Build engine first
    run build_engine
    if not result.success:
        log "Build failed. Fix errors and retry."
        respond with {"success": false}

    // Run tests
    run run_tests

    log ""
    log "Starting all services..."
    log "(In production, each runs in its own process)"
    log ""
    log "Start individually:"
    log "  nc start.nc hiveant      → port 7700"
    log "  nc start.nc swarmops     → port 7800"
    log "  nc start.nc neuraledge   → port 8000"
    log "  nc start.nc nc-ai        → port 8090"
    log "  nc start.nc portal       → port 9000 (NC UI)"
    log "  nc start.nc stock        → port 9001 (NC UI)"
    log ""

    respond with {"success": true}
